general: Title highlights KV cache compression for efficient LLM inference and the abstract describes compensation mechanisms for dynamic attention patterns and marginal-token preservation that improve throughput in resource-constrained long-context settings.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract explains SmallKV assists larger LLMs with dynamic attention awareness and marginal-token approximation during KV cache compression, boosting throughput compared to baselines.

notes: Evidence from title/abstract supports focusing on KV cache compression for LLM inference optimization.

general: Large language models are increasingly capable of handling long-context inputs, but the memory overhead of KV cache remains a major bottleneck for general-purpose deployment.

We present UniGist, a gist token-based long context compression framework that removes the need for chunk-wise training, enabling the model to learn how to compress and utilize long-range context during training.
UniGist further supports one-pass training and flexible chunk sizes during inference, allowing efficient and adaptive context processing.

notes: UniGist targets KV-cache-heavy LLM inference by learning gist-token compression and attention sparsity adaptations to reduce long-context memory use.

general: 摘要描述 Speculative Decoding 通过草稿模型预测未来 token 并让目标 LLM 验证、接收，现有方案默认所有 token 重要性相同、头结构一致、仅使用单一串行或并行范式。
解码策略优化: Gumiho 理论上论证早期草稿 token 更重要，采用混合串行+并行头架构：早期串行 Transformer 头提升准确性，后期并行轻量 MLP 提升效率，从而优先处理早期 token 以加速生成。

notes: ['核心贡献在于重构 speculative decoding 中的 token 生成顺序与头结构分配，使 early token 得到更复杂处理以提高整体效率。']

上下文与缓存优化: Existing approximate inference methods, including key-value (KV) cache dropping, sparse attention, and prompt compression, typically rely on coarse predictions of token or KV pair importance ... we introduce a framework ... (i) SpecKV ... lookahead with a small draft model to enable precise KV cache dropping; (ii) SpecPC ... leverage draft model attention activations to identify and discard less important prompt tokens; (iii) SpecKV-PC ... cascaded compression strategy combining both techniques.

notes: Abstract centers on cache/token selection via draft-model lookahead, so the main optimization target is long-context inference efficiency through KV cache dropping and prompt compression.

general: Large Language Models (LLMs) require significant GPU memory when processing long texts, with the key value (KV) cache consuming up to 70% of total memory during inference.

We introduce ChunkKV, which fundamentally reimagines KV cache compression by treating semantic chunks — rather than isolated tokens — as basic compression units, preserving complete linguistic structures and contextual integrity even under aggressive compression.

Layer-wise index reuse exploits higher cross-layer similarity of preserved indices in ChunkKV, reducing computational overhead and improving throughput by 26.5% while matching prior compression ratios.
上下文与缓存优化: ChunkKV fundamentally reimagines KV cache compression by treating semantic chunks as basic compression units, ensuring essential meaning is retained even under aggressive compression.

notes: Semantic-aware ChunkKV compresses the KV cache to reduce memory pressure for long-context LLM inference while maintaining precision (up to +8.7%) and boosting throughput, highlighting a cache/context optimization contribution.

general: Scaling laws have shaped recent advances in machine learning by enabling predictable scaling of model performance based on model size, computation, and data volume, and this work studies their interplay with compression strategies to predict behavior across compressed representations.
模型压缩: The rise in computational cost motivated model compression techniques such as quantization and sparsification; we propose a unified scaling law that predicts performance for sparse-, scalar-quantized, sparse-quantized, or vector-quantized formats and derive better algorithms for training over sparse-quantized representations.

notes: 摘要聚焦于压缩表示的缩放律及其对大模型性能预测的作用，因此将主研究对象标为 LLM/多模态 并判定为模型压缩相关优化。

general: LLM serving systems typically treat user prompts as monolithic inputs, optimizing inference through decoding tricks or inter-query batching.
Many real-world prompts contain latent semantic parallelism—decomposable structures where subtasks can be executed independently to reduce latency while preserving meaning.
系统与调度优化: Many real-world prompts contain latent semantic parallelism—decomposable structures where subtasks can be executed independently to reduce latency while preserving meaning.

notes: Focuses on exploiting latent prompt decompositions so independent subtasks reduce latency in LLM serving.

general: DeFT introduces a hardware-efficient attention algorithm for tree-based LLM inference, improving KV cache reuse and GPU utilization.
上下文与缓存优化: DeFT reduces read/write operations by KV-Guided Grouping, avoiding repeatedly loading KV cache of shared prefixes during attention computation.
系统与调度优化: Flattened Tree KV Splitting balances KV cache partitions, ensuring even distribution and reducing redundant computation while boosting GPU utilization.

notes: Based on the abstract, DeFT targets KV cache reuse and load-balanced attention partitions for tree-structured LLM inference workloads.

general: Compression methods, including quantization, distillation, and pruning, improve the computational efficiency of large reasoning models (LRMs).
模型压缩: We benchmark quantized, distilled, and pruned DeepSeek-R1 models … to interpret fine-grained causal relationships between weights and various reasoning capabilities, and show that protecting just 2% of all weights that are excessively compressed can raise average accuracy by 6.57%.

notes: Paper benchmarks quantization/distillation/pruning on LRMs and interprets which weights matter for reasoning, highlighting compression trade-offs.

模型压缩: We propose a method for the joint compression of LoRAs into a shared basis paired with LoRA-specific scaling matrices.
We extend our algorithm to learn clusters of LoRAs that are amenable to joint compression, allowing it to scale gracefully to large LoRA collections.
general: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) with low-rank adaptations (LoRAs) has become common practice, often yielding numerous copies of the same LLM differing only in their LoRA updates.
Compressed LoRAs preserve performance while offering major throughput gains in realistic serving scenarios with over a thousand LoRAs, maintaining 80% of the throughput of serving a single LoRA.

notes: 圍繞 LoRA 服務的瓶頸在於記憶體與吞吐，作者以壓縮方法讓成千上萬個 LoRA 共用基底後端放縮，重點在模型壓縮進行服務擴展。

解码策略优化: SpecEdge splits LLM workloads between edge and server GPUs using a speculative decoding scheme and proactive edge drafting to overlap edge token creation with server verification.
系统与调度优化: Pipeline-aware scheduling interleaves multiple user requests to increase server-side throughput, enabling a 1.91× cost efficiency improvement and 11.24% latency reduction compared to server-only baselines.
general: SpecEdge is an edge-assisted inference framework that exchanges only token outputs over the network to tap consumer-grade GPUs and deliver scalable, cost-effective LLM serving.

notes: Edge and server GPUs cooperate via speculative decoding plus pipeline scheduling to boost throughput and cut token latency.

模型压缩: SLIM 提出一个 one-shot 压缩框架，结合量化（SLIM-Quant）、半结构化稀疏剪枝和用于补偿误差的 saliency 函数，明确面向 LLM 权重压缩而无需重新训练。

notes: 摘要强调统一的量化＋稀疏＋低秩补偿流程作为核心贡献。

general: Post-training quantization of LLMs is proposed to reduce expensive inference, and ResQ uses PCA to find a high-variance subspace that stays in higher precision.
模型压缩: ResQ quantizes weights, activations, and KV cache tensors to 4-bit while keeping coefficients in the identified low-rank subspace at 8-bit, using invariant random rotation to suppress outliers and achieving 33% lower perplexity plus up to 3× speedup versus 16-bit baselines.

notes: ResQ is a mixed-precision PTQ scheme evaluated on Llama and Qwen2.5 that focuses on minimizing quantization error via a low-rank residual subspace.

上下文与缓存优化: 摘要描述 OrthoRank 通过分析 sink token 与其他 token 在隐藏状态中的关系, 在推理阶段动态地选择更‘重要’的 token（orthogonality 越高 importance 越大），以减少注意力/上下文开销, 并在相同稀疏度下以可比吞吐率超越层剪枝。

notes: 动态 token 选择意在压缩上下文处理负担与注意力计算，从而驱动 LLM 推理效率提升，与 layer pruning 比较凸显其上下文/缓存优化价值。

模型压缩: In this paper, we propose PruneNet, a novel model compression method that addresses these limitations by reformulating model pruning as a policy learning process.

PruneNet decouples the pruning process from the model architecture, eliminating the need for calibration datasets. It learns a stochastic pruning policy to assess parameter importance solely based on intrinsic model properties while preserving the spectral structure to minimize information loss.

notes: PruneNet shows calibration-free structured pruning for LLaMA-2-7B, preserving over 80% zero-shot performance with a 30% compression ratio.

general: Reasoning Language Model Inference Serving Unveiled: An Empirical Study
The reasoning large language model (RLLM) has been proven competitive in solving complex reasoning tasks such as mathematics, coding, compared to traditional LLM.
negative: 标题与摘要强调经验性比较研究，未提出或验证新的优化方法，因此不满足偏好标签的条件。

notes: 仅依靠摘要信息，无法判断具体优化贡献；若后续补充具体方法，可重新评估。

general: Sorbet 是一个面向受限设备、通过能效提升实现语言模型推理的 neuromorphic Transformer，摘要聚焦其硬件兼容性与能耗显著下降，定位为推理优化工作。
算子与内核优化: Sorbet 引入 PTsoftmax 与 BitShifting-based PowerNorm (BSPN) 来替代软max 和层归一化等能量密集操作，说明核心贡献在于可在 neuromorphic 硬件上实现的新算子。
模型压缩: 通过知识蒸馏与量化，Sorbet 打造成高度压缩的二值权重模型，在保持性能的同时实现 27.16× 能耗节约，表明另一主贡献是模型压缩优化。

notes: 基于摘要，Sorbet 同时提出神经元友好的新算子和压缩手段，都是主干优化点，故包含两个偏好标签。

general: 该摘要说明LRMs在长链式推理中需要生成数千token，因此Multipole Attention通过只对重要token计算精确注意力并用聚类质心近似其余token来加速自回归推理，从而缓解KV缓存压力并保持高精度。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13059))
上下文与缓存优化: 论文描述使用聚类将语义相似的key向量分组，利用质心识别重要key并近似剩余key，同时设计快速聚类更新流程以加速对已生成token的注意力计算，直接关系到长上下文的缓存与注意力开销。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13059))

notes: 作者还提供了kernel实现，在长上下文推理任务中Attention部分可达4.5×速度提升，验证了实际效率收益。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13059))

general: Presenting the first structural binarization method that compresses large language models to under 1-bit precision.
STBLLM uses N:M sparsity, layer-wise sparsification ratios, and fine-grained grouping to balance compression and accuracy, delivering lower perplexity than prior compressed binarization methods.
模型压缩: Exploiting structural binarization with a novel Standardized Importance metric and grouping strategy to quantize sparse, intermediate, and dense regions for sub-1-bit LLM weights.

notes: Code release and CUDA kernel support inference efficiency on LLaMA/OPT/Mistral families.

general: RAPID introduces Retrieval-Augmented Speculative Decoding to accelerate and improve long-context inference by letting a RAG drafter speculate for target LLMs while maintaining efficiency and incorporating inference-time knowledge transfer.
解码策略优化: Speculative Decoding’s effectiveness for long contexts is improved by RAPID, which uses a RAG drafter operating on shortened retrieval contexts to predict generations for larger long-context LLMs, yielding over 2× speedups.

notes: 主线是通过检索增强的 speculative decoding 让长上下文 LLM 推理更快更好，属于解码策略优化。

上下文与缓存优化: Inference-time hyper-scaling compresses the KV cache so more tokens can be generated within the same compute budget, and Dynamic Memory Sparsification (DMS) sparsifies KV caches with delayed eviction to preserve accuracy even at 8× compression, demonstrating accuracy gains for comparable latency and memory load.

notes: DMS targets KV cache compression during inference to unlock longer reasoning without extra compute or latency.

general: QuantSpec is a self-speculative decoding framework for long-context LLM inference that uses hierarchical 4-bit quantized KV cache and weights to accelerate decoding with high acceptance rates.
解码策略优化: The draft model shares the target architecture but uses quantized caches in a self-speculative decoding workflow, achieving consistent end-to-end speedups up to ∼2.5×.
上下文与缓存优化: Hierarchical 4-bit quantized KV cache reduces memory and KV cache loading overheads, improving latency/memory compared to sparse KV cache alternatives for long-context inference.

notes: Speculative decoding is the primary innovation while hierarchical quantized KV caching targets long-context cache efficiency on edge devices.

general: SERE dynamically reduces the number of active experts in an input-aware manner by rerouting tokens from secondary experts to similar primary counterparts, addressing the tension between batch decoding and expert sparsity while preserving critical experts.
系统与调度优化: SERE enables dynamic expert skipping based on batch-level expert redundancy to cut redundant activations and accelerate the memory-bound batch decoding stage for MoE serving.

notes: 面向 MoE 批推理服务，提供输入感知的专家重路由，配合自定义 CUDA 内核即可在 vLLM 中无缝启用。

general: Optimizing the Key-Value (KV) cache of the Large Language Model (LLM) has been considered critical to saving the cost of inference...propose SqueezeAttention to precisely optimize the allocation of KV-cache budget among layers on-the-fly and then incorporate three representative sequence-wise algorithms to compress the KV-cache for each layer with its very own budget.
上下文与缓存优化: By identifying the importance of attention layers, we optimize the KV-cache jointly from sequence-wise and layer-wise dimensions, categorizing layers by cosine similarity of prompt differences and adjusting their KV budgets accordingly.

notes: Layer-wise importance estimation plus per-layer KV budget allocation yields 30–70% memory savings and up to 2.2× throughput improvement.

general: MagicPIG uses LSH-based sampling to approximate attention, reducing KV cache workload while preserving accuracy for long-context LLM generation.
上下文与缓存优化: MagicPIG stores LSH hash tables and runs attention computation on the CPU, allowing it to serve longer contexts and larger batch sizes without recomputing KV cache entries.

notes: Heterogeneous system that targets KV cache bottlenecks by sampling attention with theoretical guarantees to support longer contexts and larger batches.

general: Mixing Importance with Diversity: Joint Optimization for KV Cache Compression in Large Vision-Language Models
上下文与缓存优化: Recent large vision-language models (LVLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities in processing extended multi-modal sequences, yet the resulting key-value (KV) cache expansion creates a critical memory bottleneck that fundamentally limits deployment scalability.

notes: KV cache compression is the main thesis, so only context/cache optimization is marked.

general: CDPruner defines conditional similarity between visual tokens and reformulates pruning with determinantal point processes to maximize conditional diversity, making the training-free, model-agnostic method broadly applicable to MLLMs while retaining strong accuracy.
Applying CDPruner to LLaVA reduces FLOPs by 95% and CUDA latency by 78% while maintaining 94% of original accuracy, showing the method concretely improves inference efficiency.
上下文与缓存优化: Current approaches remove redundant visual tokens, but CDPruner instead maximizes the conditional diversity of retained visual tokens so that pruning better represents inputs while adhering to instructions, reducing inference cost of long visual contexts.

notes: Token pruning via CDPruner directly targets long-context visual tokens in MLLMs, yielding large FLOPs/latency savings through instruction-aware subset selection.

上下文与缓存优化: ParallelComp splits the input into chunks, dynamically evicting redundant chunks and irrelevant tokens, supported by a parallel KV cache eviction mechanism.
We further design a KV cache eviction technique to mitigate attention biases and enable ultra-long context extrapolation on a single A100 80GB GPU.

notes: Training-free long-context compressor that evicts redundant chunks and recalibrates KV cache to stretch 8B LLMs from 8K to 128K tokens.

general: Adaptive quantization for KV caches exploits dependencies between keys and values and targets optimal compression while preserving quality, achieving near-lossless inference on Llama 3.2 at 2-2.5 bits per value with <1% relative error.
The method calibrates compact adapters on a single GPU within 1-6 hours even for 70B models, improving compression rates of Key-Value cache vectors without sacrificing accuracy.

notes: AQUA-KV is an adaptive quantization approach that targets KV cache compression for long-context LLM inference, so the primary research object is the LLM and the only preference label supported by the abstract is context/cache optimization.

general: 摘要只提到通过视觉思维补充语言推理以提升多模态大模型的空间推理能力，并未描述任何解码策略、上下文缓存、系统调度、算子内核、结构或压缩等优化方法。

notes: 缺乏明确的偏好优化方法描述，因而判定为 negative。

上下文与缓存优化: We demonstrate that unstructured sparsity significantly improves KV cache compression for LLMs, enabling sparsity levels up to 70% without compromising accuracy or requiring fine-tuning.

KV cache size is the major bottleneck in decode performance due to high memory overhead for large context lengths; to address this, we use a bitmap-based sparse format and a custom attention kernel capable of compressing and directly computing over compressed caches, significantly accelerating memory-bound operations.

notes: Focuses on KV cache pruning/compression for LLM inference, pairing bitmap-based sparse encoding with a sparse attention kernel to cut cache size and boost throughput (claimed up to 2.23×).

general: Disaggregating the prefill and decoding phases represents an effective new paradigm for generative inference of large language models (LLM). This approach offers some significant system advantages, such as eliminating prefill-decoding interference and optimizing resource allocation. However, it is still an open problem how to deploy the disaggregated inference paradigm across a group of heterogeneous GPUs, which can be an economic alternative to deploying over homogeneous high-performance GPUs.

notes: 系统贡献集中在异构 GPU 上部署预填充与解码分离以优化资源调度与避免干扰。

general: MagicDec identifies bottleneck shifts with batch size and length to deploy SD effectively for high-throughput inference.
Theoretical model selects the optimal drafting strategy for maximum speedup.
解码策略优化: Speculative decoding still speeds up high-throughput inference and MagicDec deploys SD more effectively for large batches and lengths.
上下文与缓存优化: Sparse KV cache on the draft model addresses bottlenecks scaling with sequence length and batch size.

notes: MagicDec combines SD tuning with sparse KV cache drafting to improve the latency-throughput tradeoff for long-context LLM serving.

general: Abstract only discusses adapting causal mask attention from LLMs to handle visual queries and relax rigid future masking constraints, without presenting a clear decoding, caching, system, kernel, structural inference, or compression optimization as a primary contribution.

notes: No preference label applies because the abstract frames a modeling insight about causal masking for vision-language inference rather than an explicit optimization method listed in the requested labels.

general: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by drafting tokens with a compact model and then verifying in parallel, and SWIFT introduces on-the-fly self-speculative decoding that skips intermediate layers without auxiliary models to speed up inference up to ~1.3×–1.6× while keeping the generated text distribution.
SWIFT adaptively selects which intermediate layers to skip during inference, enabling plug-and-play acceleration across diverse inputs without extra training.
解码策略优化: SWIFT explores layer-skipping as a self-draft mechanism and adaptively skips intermediate layers on-the-fly as part of the speculative decoding process, directly modifying the token generation/verification workflow for speedups.

notes: Positive due to a new speculative decoding algorithm that skips layers within the LLM itself, yielding self-contained decoding acceleration.

general: LLMs’ expanding KV cache during decoding creates a memory bottleneck, so TidalDecode leverages position persistent sparse attention with pre-selected tokens to cut token selection overhead without hurting generation quality.
上下文与缓存优化: They interleave a few full-attention token-selection layers with sparse attention over pre-selected tokens, reducing the KV cache growth and decoding latency while closely matching full-attention performance.

notes: Focuses on reducing KV cache size and token-selection overhead during decoding, so the cache-oriented optimization label is the only evidence-backed preference.

general: Large language models (LLMs) excel at processing long sequences, boosting demand for key-value (KV) caching.
上下文与缓存优化: We introduce Cascading and Adaptive KV cache Eviction (CAKE), a novel approach that frames KV cache eviction as a “cake-slicing problem.”

notes: CAKE targets KV cache eviction policies with layer-aware resource allocation to balance differing attention behaviors.

general: HashAttention identifies pivotal tokens per query with Hamming-space encodings and bitwise operations, then computes attention using only those tokens to reduce per-query token usage by up to 16× (32× after fine-tuning) with minimal quality loss.
上下文与缓存优化: Exploit token sparsity by framing pivotal-token identification as a recommendation problem and selecting a small subset of tokens for attention, directly cutting the effective context size and auxiliary memory per token to 32 bits while preserving quality.

notes: Token selection is the core contribution, trading fewer attended tokens for sustained model quality and lower memory/per-token overhead.

general: Head-level KV cache compression for LLMs with integrated contextual reasoning estimation retains only 1.5% of the cache while matching 97% performance on long-context QA benchmarks across models like Llama-3-8B and Mistral-7B.
上下文与缓存优化: HeadKV and HeadKV-R2 compress KV cache at the head level by estimating head importance for contextual QA, significantly outperforming prior layer-level approaches and operating directly on KV cache retention.

notes: 摘要强调 HeadKV/HeadKV-R2 的主要贡献是 KV cache 压缩与上下文相关的 head 选择，故归类为上下文与缓存优化。

general: CogVLA proposes a cognition-aligned VLA framework that leverages instruction-driven routing and sparsification through a three-stage progressive architecture to improve efficiency and performance.
模型结构侧推理优化: The three stages—EFA-Routing, LFP-Routing, and V-L-A Coupled Attention—inject instruction information, prune instruction-irrelevant visually grounded tokens, and combine causal vision-language attention with bidirectional action parallel decoding, highlighting new inference-focused routing/attention structures.

notes: Instruction-driven routing and sparsification reshape the inference pipeline of VLM-based VLA models, so the key optimization lies in the inference structure rather than kernel or system tweaks.

primary_research_object: 检索 / 推荐 / 搜索

general: SLMRec distills large recommendation-focused LLMs into much smaller language models by pruning redundant intermediate layers, enabling sequential recommendation on industry datasets with just 13% of the parameters yet comparable performance and large training/inference speedups as a result of the compression-focused design. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/58ab3d5ad04589543889118f80654279-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))
模型压缩: A simple yet effective knowledge distillation method empowers the small language model to inherit the LLM’s capabilities while keeping only a fraction of the parameters (13%) and obtaining up to 6.6×/8.0× training/inference speedups, making compression the core contribution. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/58ab3d5ad04589543889118f80654279-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

notes: Distillation-based compression of the teacher LLM is the main contribution; no other optimization categories are claimed. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/58ab3d5ad04589543889118f80654279-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: Sparse RAG encodes retrieved documents in parallel, eliminating latency from long-range attention of retrieved documents, and then LLMs selectively decode by only attending to highly relevant caches chosen via prompting with special control tokens, which reduces the number of documents loaded during decoding to accelerate inference.

notes: Sparse RAG’s sparse context selection and cache-aware decoding explicitly optimize the context/caching pathway for RAG inference, balancing quality and efficiency.

上下文与缓存优化: VL-Cache introduces layer-adaptive sparsity-aware cache budget allocation plus modality-aware token scoring to shrink KV cache while preserving accuracy.
general: Tailored KV cache compression for VLMs, distinguishing visual/text tokens across prefill and decoding to cut storage and latency.

notes: VL-Cache compresses VLM KV caches, boosting decoding speed (up to 7.08×) while cutting cache memory by 90%.

general: Abstract: D₂O dynamically optimizes KV cache size at layer and token levels to cut context memory growth and improve throughput for long-context LLM inference without fine-tuning.
上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: the layer-level dynamic allocation strategy avoids excessive eviction in sensitive layers, while the token-level compensation mechanism re-discriminates discarded tokens, recalling and merging similar ones to preserve context.

notes: 摘要明确提出针对 KV cache eviction 的层级动态策略和补偿机制，属于上下文与缓存优化。

上下文与缓存优化: Introduces AttentionPredictor, a lightweight model predicting attention patterns to compress KV cache and identify critical tokens.([neurips.cc](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/poster/118927))

notes: Achieves 13× KV cache compression and 5.6× speedup while maintaining LLM quality in cache offloading scenarios.([neurips.cc](https://neurips.cc/virtual/2025/poster/118927))

general: LeanQuant proposes learning loss-error-aware quantization grids to avoid non-adaptive min-max affine issues and generalizes to affine and non-uniform quantization for better compatibility.
Experiments show LeanQuant can accurately quantize Llama-3.1 405B using two Quadro RTX 8000-48GB GPUs in 21 hours, highlighting its scalability.
模型压缩: LeanQuant is an accurate, versatile, and scalable post-training quantization method that learns loss-error-aware grids and outperforms competitive baselines in model quality, enabling quantization of very large LLMs.

notes: Quantization-focused paper with strong evidence that the main contribution is model compression via novel grid learning and scalable PTQ; only include the directly supported label.

general: PolarQuant divides key vectors into groups of two-dimensional sub-vectors, encoding them as the quantized radius and the polar angle to efficiently quantize the KV cache while preserving full-precision performance.
It accelerates decoding by replacing the query-key inner product with a table lookup after quantization.
模型压缩: Quantizing the cache to lower bit widths is an effective way to reduce memory costs, and PolarQuant addresses key cache quantization by representing key vectors in polar space to alleviate outliers.

notes: 专注于通过对关键缓存的极坐标量化降低显存并加速推理，属于模型压缩范畴。

general: Abstract: One approach to reducing the costs of LLMs is quantized or sparse representations, and QuEST introduces accurate/faster quantization plus a trust gradient estimator to stabilize training down to 1-bit weights and activations. ([proceedings.mlr.press](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/panferov25a.html))
模型压缩: Abstract: QuEST demonstrates optimality at 4-bits and stable convergence at 1-bit weights and activations by improving quantization of weight/activation distributions and gradient estimation, directly targeting low-precision LLM training. ([proceedings.mlr.press](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/panferov25a.html))

notes: ['Experiments show stable scaling laws across precision ranges and GPU kernel support for efficient inference of the compressed models. ([proceedings.mlr.press](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/panferov25a.html))']

general: Polybasic speculative decoding framework extends dualistic draft-verify approaches with a multi-model theoretical analysis to optimize acceptance lengths, model capabilities, and computational cost for LLM inference speedup.
解码策略优化: Describes a novel speculative decoding paradigm and theoretical proof of optimal inference time for multi-model speculative decoding systems, achieving 3.31×–4.43× acceleration while preserving output distributions.

general: Transformer-based LLMs cache growing context as KV pairs, which inflates KV sizes and attention latency as context length increases.
上下文与缓存优化: KVzip quantifies KV importance via context reconstruction to evict low-importance pairs, enabling 3-4x KV cache reduction and ~2x FlashAttention decoding latency savings over long contexts while maintaining QA/retrieval performance.

notes: Query-agnostic KV cache eviction for long-context inference reuse.

general: "Palu decomposes the linear layers into low-rank matrices, caches compressed intermediate states, and reconstructs the full keys and values on the fly."
"Palu compresses KV-Cache by 50% while maintaining strong accuracy and delivering up to 1.89× speedup on the RoPE-based attention module."
上下文与缓存优化: "Palu further encompasses (1) a medium-grained low-rank decomposition scheme, (2) an efficient rank search algorithm, (3) low-rank-aware quantization compatibility enhancements, and (4) an optimized GPU kernel with matrix fusion."

notes: Focused on low-rank KV-cache compression for inference-time LLMs.

general: Delta correction aligns sparse attention outputs with quadratic attention to recover 88% of full accuracy while keeping ~98.5% sparsity and little overhead, enabling 32× speedup relative to Flash Attention 2 on 1M-token prefills.
算子与内核优化: The proposed procedure corrects the distributional shift introduced by sparse attention inference so decoding-time queries match prefill keys, yielding a 36ppt average performance boost when applied atop sliding-window attention with sink tokens.

notes: Sparse attention inference algorithm adds a lightweight correction step to keep accuracy close to dense attention for long-context decoding.

general: Speculative decoding pairs a draft model with the target model but suffers mutual waiting, so PEARL introduces pre-verify (verify first draft token during drafting) and post-verify (generate more drafts during verification) to parallelize the two phases and adapt draft length, yielding up to 4.43× speedup over auto-regressive and 1.50× over vanilla speculative decoding in text generation benchmarks. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/03b1043052700b1a471996b0baf309d4-Paper-Conference.pdf))
解码策略优化: PEARL’s pre-verify and post-verify strategies explicitly alter the decoding workflow—allowing the target model to verify tokens early and letting the draft model extend generation while verification runs—to alleviate the mutual waiting problem and accelerate token generation. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/03b1043052700b1a471996b0baf309d4-Paper-Conference.pdf))

notes: PEARL’s contributions focus on speculative decoding workflow improvements; no other optimization categories are presented as primary contributions in the abstract.

上下文与缓存优化: As the length of input text grows, the key-value (KV) cache in LLMs imposes prohibitive GPU memory costs and limits long-context inference on resource-constrained devices.

notes: 优化KV缓存以支撑资源受限设备上的长上下文推理。

general: 摘要描述 ThinKV 在面向长输出 CoT 的大型推理模型中提出 thought-adaptive KV cache compression，以缓解 KV cache 迅速膨胀对 GPU 显存的压迫，同时提升推理性能。
上下文与缓存优化: ThinKV 通过按思维重要性分配 token 精度并随着推理演化逐步驱逐低重要性 token，从而在数学和编码基准上用不到原始 KV cache 5% 的空间实现 near-lossless 精度，并达到比 SoTA 高 5.8 倍的吞吐，直接体现了上下文与缓存压缩优化的主贡献。

notes: 依据摘要信息判断，主贡献是面向大型推理模型的 KV cache 压缩和动态 eviction。

general: Large Language Models … suffer from quadratic complexity; SepLLM compresses segments into separator tokens and eliminates redundant tokens to accelerate inference and handle streams of 4 million+ tokens while maintaining modeling quality.
Experimental results show SepLLM reduces KV cache by over 50% on GSM8K-CoT with Llama-3-8B and remains effective across training-free, from-scratch, and post-training settings.
上下文与缓存优化: Observation: separator tokens carry disproportionately high attention, so segment information can be condensed into separators without much loss, allowing SEP to remove redundant tokens and shrink context footprints.
SepLLM achieves >50% KV cache reduction on GSM8K-CoT, demonstrating significant context/cache savings tied to the proposed compression.

notes: Streaming-capable framework plus efficient kernels support both inference and training acceleration.

算子与内核优化: We present CodeGEMM, a codebook-centric GEMM kernel that replaces dequantization with precomputed inner products between centroids and activations stored in a lightweight Psumbook.

notes: CodeGEMM introduces a custom GEMM kernel that avoids per-element dequantization lookups by gathering precomputed partial sums from a Psumbook, clearly positioning it as an operator/kernel optimization for quantized LLM inference.

general: Evaluation on the state-of-the-art text-to-image VAR model family, Infinity, demonstrates that our approach effectively reduces the required KV cache memory to 10% while preserving pixel-level fidelity.
上下文与缓存优化: To address these bottlenecks, we introduce ScaleKV, a novel KV cache compression framework tailored for VAR architectures.
ScaleKV optimizes the multi-scale inference pipeline by identifying scale-specific drafters and refiners, facilitating differentiated cache management tailored to each scale.

notes: ScaleKV explicitly tackles the exponential KV cache growth in VAR inference via scale-aware cache compression aligned to layer roles.

general: PPE explicitly encodes 3D positions when compressing redundant visual tokens, allowing each merged token to preserve spatiotemporal structure and support cascade clustering that keeps performance on vision-language benchmarks.

The method is parameter-free, plugs into existing token merging frameworks, and consistently improves MMBench, TextVQA, and VideoMME, showing that preserving positional cues is critical for efficient MLLM reasoning.
上下文与缓存优化: The operator compresses visual tokens while keeping spatial layouts and temporal continuity so that cascade clustering can gradually reduce sequence length without disrupting positional relationships.

notes: Focuses on token compression to shrink visual context and retain reasoning quality in multimodal LLMs.

general: The study proposes a public decoding and secure verification approach that lets the client use a public model to generate tokens that a private model then securely verifies for acceptance.
They improve the approach’s efficiency by improving the acceptance ratio via a private sampling protocol tuned for cryptographic primitives and by aligning the models through knowledge distillation.
解码策略优化: A public decoding and secure verification scheme is used so that the public model proposes tokens and the private model verifies them, which is the core decoding strategy change.

notes: 通过公私模型分工的验证机制与为加密环境定制的抽样、蒸馏对齐手段，论文在保持隐私的前提下优化了 GPT 的安全解码流程。

general: ParetoQ introduces a unified framework for comparing 1-bit to 4-bit quantization settings, refining training schemes and quantization functions to improve the size-accuracy trade-off for LLMs.
模型压缩: Abstract reports optimizing quantization functions across sub-4-bit regimes, achieving better accuracy than previous SoTA ternary models while cutting parameter counts, and showing ternary/2-bit/3-bit quantization outperforms 4-bit and binary alternatives.

notes: Focus is on extremely low-bit quantization of LLMs, highlighting ParetoQ’s improvements in size-accuracy trade-offs and memory/speed benefits for 2-bit deployment.

general: Post-training quantization is used to compress LLMs and SliM-LLM introduces salience-driven mixed-precision quantization with group-wise bit allocation and salience-weighted quantizer calibration to retain important information while their structured partitioning keeps it hardware-friendly, matching uniform-precision efficiency and maintaining GPU inference speed.
模型压缩: SliM-LLM adaptively assigns bit-widths based on group salience and calibrates quantizers with element-level salience, enabling low-bit-width LLaMA-7B (2-bit) to cut memory usage by nearly 6x and cut perplexity by 48% versus prior gradient-free PTQ methods.

notes: Salience-driven mixed-precision quantization is the core contribution, with an extended SliM-LLM+ gradient-based variant further improving perplexity.

上下文与缓存优化: SpeCache offloads the complete KV cache to large CPU memory and dynamically fetches KV pairs per decoding step based on their importance measured by a low-precision copy in VRAM.

To avoid latency from CPU-GPU communication, SpeCache speculatively predicts the KV pairs that the next token might attend to and prefetches them before the next decoding step, allowing parallel prefetching and computation.

notes: SpeCache targets long-context LLM decoding by keeping full cache on CPU and speculatively prefetching hotspots, reducing VRAM pressure without retraining.

general: Star Attention在保持97-100%准确率的前提下，通过分布式块稀疏注意力将内存与推理时间压缩至最多11倍。
上下文与缓存优化: 第二阶段的sequence-global attention让query/response可直接访问此前缓存的所有token。
系统与调度优化: 第一阶段在多主机间并行地采用blockwise-local attention，并且最小化通信开销，实现了跨主机的注意力分片。

notes: 摘要明确描述了面向长上下文的缓存式global attention优化和跨主机注意力分片系统架构；因此标注了对应的两项偏好标签。

general: Title emphasizes "Dynamic Visual-Token Exit" as the acceleration mechanism for multimodal LLMs, pointing to an early-exit decoding strategy.
解码策略优化: The paper accelerates MLLMs via a dynamic visual-token exit, indicating a decoding strategy change to stop processing redundant visual tokens.

notes: Based on the title and abstract fragment, the claimed contribution is early-exit decoding for multimodal tokens; no further label evidence seen.

general: RetroAttention introduces a KV cache update technique that retrospectively revises past attention outputs using newly arrived entries, breaking the fixed-attention-output paradigm while keeping latency low.
Experiments on long-generation benchmarks show RetroAttention improves effective KV exposure by up to 1.6× and accuracy by up to 21.9% over prior KV compression methods.
上下文与缓存优化: RetroAttention maintains a lightweight output cache so past queries can be supplemented with more contexts, addressing cumulative attention errors that arise during long decoding and extending KV cache exposure.

notes: 重点在于面向长上下文解码的 KV 缓存更新/补写，属于上下文与缓存优化而非结构、压缩或系统层面的主贡献。

general: Abstract describes HiP’s training-free hierarchical pruning that reduces attention to O(T log T) time and O(T) space, enabling millions-token LLM serving with lower latency/memory for long-context generation on commodity GPUs. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/043f0503c4f652c737add3690aa5d12c-Paper-Conference.pdf))
上下文与缓存优化: HiP leverages attention locality to estimate top-k keys on the fly via a tree-search–like process and pairs it with KV cache offloading that keeps only O(log T) tokens on GPU, directly reducing long-context attention and cache costs during decoding. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/043f0503c4f652c737add3690aa5d12c-Paper-Conference.pdf))

notes: Training-free HiP improves long-context inference by pruning attention and shrinking KV cache residency without retraining, so pretrained LLMs can scale to millions of tokens. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/043f0503c4f652c737add3690aa5d12c-Paper-Conference.pdf))

上下文与缓存优化: Title ReST-KV: Robust KV Cache Eviction with Layer-wise Output Reconstruction and Spatial-Temporal Smoothing shows the contribution centers on KV cache eviction.
Abstract notes LLM generative inference faces growing memory demands from KV caches for long sequences, justifying the proposed eviction and smoothing techniques.

notes: The paper proposes KV cache eviction and reconstruction methods to reduce long-context memory pressure during LLM inference.

general: EasySpec introduces a layer-parallel speculation strategy that breaks inter-layer dependencies so multiple draft-model layers can execute simultaneously across devices, improving multi-GPU utilization during speculative decoding.
解码策略优化: Speculative decoding uses a smaller drafter model to propose tokens verified by the base LLM, and EasySpec calibrates the draft model’s key-value cache after each iteration while preserving the base distribution, yielding up to 4.17× speedup versus vanilla decoding.

notes: Training-free plug-in that keeps drafting accuracy high while accelerating multi-GPU speculative decoding throughput.

general: Transformer-based LLMs rely on KV caching to avoid redundant computation during autoregressive inference, but cache size becomes a bottleneck for long-context tasks.
LookaheadKV augments transformer layers with parameter-efficient modules trained to predict true importance scores with high accuracy while keeping runtime overhead negligible.
上下文与缓存优化: LookaheadKV is a lightweight eviction framework that leverages future-response prediction strength without costly draft generation to guide prompt KV eviction.

Extensive experiments show LookaheadKV reduces eviction cost by up to 14.5× and significantly accelerates time-to-first-token on long-context understanding benchmarks, outperforming recent baselines by 25%.

notes: Evidence centers on LookaheadKV’s KV cache eviction modules that predict importance scores to achieve faster long-context inference with lower eviction cost.

上下文与缓存优化: KV caching is a fundamental technique for accelerating LLM inference by reusing key-value pairs from previous queries, but its effectiveness under limited memory is highly sensitive to the eviction policy.

notes: Abstract focuses on improving the KV eviction policy under memory constraints, which targets cache/context optimization.

general: RocketKV 通过两阶段 KV cache 压缩避免了随着输入扩展而爆涨的 KV cache 体积，在 decode 期间实现高压缩率和显存节省。
上下文与缓存优化: 第一阶段对输入 token 进行粗粒度永久性 KV cache 驱逐，第二阶段采用 head/sequence 降维的 top-k 稀疏 attention 实现精细粒度压缩，最终达成最高 400× 压缩与 32.6% 峰值内存下降。

notes: 摘要未提及其他偏好标签，故仅标记上下文与缓存优化。

general: HShare facilitates the sharing of critical KV cache token indices across layers, heads, and queries, which significantly reduces the computational overhead associated with query-aware dynamic token sparsity.
上下文与缓存优化: The frequent retrieval of KV cache data causes inference inefficiency, so HShare hierarchically shares critical KV cache token indices to cut down the overhead of dynamic sparse patterns and speeds up self-attention and end-to-end throughput.

notes: Hierarchical KV sharing directly targets KV cache retrieval costs to accelerate decoding without introducing new system or compression methods.

general: Abstract explains that post-training compression methods (pruning, quantization) rely on calibration data and introduces a calibration data curation framework to improve those methods’ ability to preserve LLM capabilities.
模型压缩: The paper proposes a calibration data curation framework that enhances the performance of existing post-training compression methods when preserving critical LLM capabilities.

notes: Calibration-focused data selection is the new contribution rather than systems or scheduling changes.

general: Improved ADC distills a 3D spatio-temporal DiT teacher into a pruned 2D SD backbone with lightweight 1D temporal convolutions and dual-head adversarial distillation, yielding significantly higher efficiency.
Resulting AdcVSR cuts parameters by 95% and runs 8× faster than the DiT teacher while keeping competitive quality.
模型压缩: Our method prunes and distills the large diffusion Transformer into a compact AdcSR backbone, then applies dual-head adversarial distillation to balance detail and consistency, amounting to a compressed AdcVSR with 95% fewer parameters and 8× acceleration.

notes: Focuses on pruning/distillation of diffusion model and dual-head adversarial training to retain spatio-temporal fidelity.

general: LONGGEN integrates context-length extension with a GPU-friendly KV-cache-reducing architecture to finetune pretrained LLMs to 128K contexts, yielding 1.55× faster training, 62% less KV memory, and 1.41-1.67× inference speedups. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/127a649ea9ae2df15e903a91352cfd3a-Paper-Conference.pdf))
上下文与缓存优化: It adopts sparse attention patterns (window, attention sink, blockwise) inside a hybrid 1/3 full + 2/3 sparse layer stack so the model keeps access to all tokens while slashing KV cache overhead during both length extension training and inference. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/127a649ea9ae2df15e903a91352cfd3a-Paper-Conference.pdf))

notes: LIGHT training on 5B long-context tokens extends Llama-2 models from 4K to 128K with a custom Triton kernel inspired by FlashAttention-2, prioritizing balanced memory access for serving long-context LLMs. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/file/127a649ea9ae2df15e903a91352cfd3a-Paper-Conference.pdf))

general: Title: Dialogue Without Limits: Constant-Sized KV Caches for Extended Response in LLMs

Abstract: Autoregressive Transformers rely on Key-Value (KV) caching to accelerate inference, but the linear growth of the KV cache with context length leads to excessive memory consumption and bandwidth constraints, so existing methods drop distant tokens or compress states in a lossy manner.
上下文与缓存优化: Title: Dialogue Without Limits: Constant-Sized KV Caches for Extended Response in LLMs

Abstract: Autoregressive Transformers rely on Key-Value (KV) caching to accelerate inference, but the linear growth of the KV cache with context length leads to excessive memory consumption and bandwidth constraints.

notes: Proposes capped KV caches so extended responses do not inflate memory.

general: REFORM handles extremely long contexts by incrementally processing chunks while building cross-layer context embeddings and selectively recomputing a compressed KV cache, delivering large performance gains across benchmarks.
上下文与缓存优化: The first phase keeps a compressed KV cache and recomputes it selectively while gathering essential tokens via similarity matching, explicitly targeting long-context efficiency.
解码策略优化: REFORM pairs its long-context handling with an early exit strategy to boost inference efficiency on top of the cache management.

notes: Long-context inference framework pairing cache compression/recomputation with early-exit decoding for LLMs.

general: LLaVA-Mini introduces modality pre-fusion to fuse visual information into text tokens in advance, thereby facilitating the extreme compression of vision tokens fed to the LLM backbone into one token.
上下文与缓存优化: Experiments across 11 image-based and 7 video-based benchmarks show LLaVA-Mini outperforms LLaVA-v1.5 with just 1 vision token instead of 576, and efficiency analyses report 77% lower FLOPs, responses within 40 ms, and processing over 10,000 video frames on 24 GB GPUs, highlighting explicit reduction of context-token overhead.

notes: Token compression via modality pre-fusion is the primary optimization; no other preference labels are claimed by the abstract.

general: AdaDecode adaptively generates tokens at intermediate layers when confidence is high so subsequent token computation can start immediately while remaining layers run in parallel, improving throughput with parity to standard decoding.
解码策略优化: By predicting some tokens early at intermediate layers and deferring remaining layer work in parallel with later tokens, AdaDecode changes the decoding flow to reduce sequential latency.

notes: AdaDecode targets LLM autoregressive decoding efficiency through adaptive intermediate-layer token prediction, matching the user preference for decoding-strategy-focused improvements.

general: 标题与摘要都表明目标是针对边缘推理场景加速线性递归神经网络，强调硬件友好的优化以降低延迟和能耗。
模型压缩: “Accelerating Linear Recurrent Neural Networks for the Edge with Unstructured Sparsity” 明确将无结构稀疏性作为核心手段，即通过模型压缩提升推理速度。

notes: 面向资源受限边缘设备的流式推理优化。

general: PM-KVQ提出针对长CoT大模型的渐进式混合精度KV cache量化策略，结合块级bit-width调节和位置插值校准以降低累计量化误差并适配长上下文数据，目标是在相同内存预算下保持推理质量。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18610?utm_source=openai))
模型压缩: 该论文的核心贡献是KV cache的后训练量化，通过渐进式bit-width降低及块级精度分配、校准策略在保留更多关键块精度的同时压缩KV cache，从而在推理中减小显存占用且不显著退化性能。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18610?utm_source=openai))

notes: 专注KV cache的量化压缩与校准，面向长CoT推理场景。

general: 提出 SPP 动态剪枝方法，通过对掩码参数的微分包含式生成整个正则化路径，单阶段即可支持任意压缩比。
模型压缩: 将 transformer 分段为 query-key、value-projection 及线性层对，并在这些对上施加低秩压缩，保持输出结构同时实现结构化压缩。

general: Meeting service-level objectives (SLOs) in LLM serving is critical, but managing the high variability in load presents a significant challenge ... NestedFP provides a flexible platform for dynamic, SLO-aware precision selection.
算子与内核优化: By leveraging a compact data format for the overlay and a specialized GEMM kernel optimized for this format, NestedFP ensures minimal degradation in both model quality and inference throughput across both FP8 and FP16 modes.
模型压缩: This paper proposes NestedFP ... by overlaying FP8 parameters onto FP16 parameters, allowing both models to share the same FP16 memory footprint.

notes: NestedFP enables memory-efficient FP8/FP16 dual-precision LLM serving via a compact overlay format and matching GEMM kernel so SLO-aware precision switching keeps throughput and quality stable.

general: Large language models have demonstrated promising capabilities upon scaling up parameters. However, serving large language models incurs substantial computation and memory movement costs due to their large scale.
模型压缩: Quantization methods have been employed to reduce service costs and latency. Nevertheless, outliers in activations hinder the development of INT4 weight-activation quantization. Existing approaches separate outliers and normal values into two matrices or migrate outliers from activations to weights, suffering from high latency or accuracy degradation.

notes: Observation that activations contain channel-wise and spike outliers motivates a training-free activation smoother to enable accurate INT4 inference.

general: Cake introduces a KV cache loading system that balances computation and I/O to reduce Time to First Token for prefix caching.
上下文与缓存优化: Cake dynamically balances KV cache computation and loading to reduce redundant computation and latency in prefix caching for long-context LLM inference.
系统与调度优化: Cake’s bidirectional scheduling and adaptive mechanism optimally utilizes both compute and I/O resources and handles non-prefix caching requests to improve throughput.

notes: 2.6× TTFT reduction across hardware, datasets, and storage conditions demonstrates practical acceleration for long-context LLM inference.

general: Layer tying and Recursive Transformer loops convert pretrained LLMs into smaller models with shared parameters while preserving performance, and Relaxed Recursive Transformers add depth-wise LoRA to keep compactness.
模型压缩: We revisit layer tying as parameter sharing in Transformers to create Recursive Transformers that reuse a single block of unique layers, and Relaxed Recursive Transformers introduce depth-wise LoRA to improve flexibility while keeping the model compact, enabling smaller recursive variants to match larger counterparts.
系统与调度优化: Continuous Depth-wise Batching, enabled by the Recursive Transformer together with early exiting, is proposed as a new inference paradigm that theoretically yields 2-3× throughput gains.

notes: Parameter sharing plus depth-wise LoRA drives the model-compression gain, while the new batch+early-exit inference paradigm targets serving throughput improvements.

general: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) is increasingly constrained by memory and latency bottlenecks, motivating the need for quantization techniques that flexibly balance accuracy and efficiency.
模型压缩: Quantization techniques and hardware-efficient flexible binary-coded quantization for multi-precision LLMs are proposed to balance accuracy and efficiency under memory and latency constraints.

notes: Paper centers on binary-coded quantization for LLM inference, so model compression is the only applicable preference label.

general: Lexico compresses KV cache via sparse coding over a universal dictionary, keeping 90-95% accuracy while using only 15-25% of full KV-cache memory across Mistral, Llama 3, and Qwen2.5.
上下文与缓存优化: Key-value cache can be approximated with sparse linear combinations from a ~4k-atom dictionary, enabling flexible compression ratios controlled by sparsity and outperforming quantization/token eviction, especially in low-memory regimes such as LongBench and GSM8K.

notes: Sparse coding with orthogonal matching pursuit lets Lexico reduce KV cache storage up to 1.7× compared to 2-bit quantization while maintaining high accuracy, demonstrating a cache-centric optimization rather than model structure changes.

general: LycheeDecode targets long-context LLM inference by keeping performance comparable to full attention while providing up to a 2.7x speedup at 128K context length through its fine-grained handling of attention heads and crucial tokens.
上下文与缓存优化: The paper frames the problem as the rapidly expanding key-value cache during decoding imposing heavy memory and latency costs, and introduces a hybrid-head attention mechanism where retrieval heads dynamically identify crucial tokens while sparse heads reuse them for efficient computation, directly addressing cache growth and long-context efficiency.

notes: Evidence focuses on the cache-aware decoding method (hybrid heads + key-token selection) that primarily optimizes context/cache handling.

general: The title/abstract emphasize “Speculate Deep and Accurate…via Substitute Speculative Decoding” as a training-free acceleration for offloaded LLMs on memory-limited consumer GPUs.
解码策略优化: The core contribution described is substitute speculative decoding, i.e., changing the token generation/verification flow to speed up large LLM inference without retraining.

notes: Based solely on the title and one-sentence abstract, the work targets LLM inference via speculative decoding to reduce latency/memory pressure; no other optimization theme is highlighted.

general: We introduce speculative speculative decoding (SSD) to parallelize speculative decoding by pre-emptively predicting verification outcomes, eliminating speculation overhead and solving three key challenges with principled methods.

Saguaro, the optimized SSD algorithm, runs up to twice as fast as optimized speculative decoding baselines and up to 5× faster than autoregressive decoding while remaining compatible with methods like EAGLE and token tree speculation.
解码策略优化: Speculative speculative decoding (SSD) breaks the sequential dependence between speculation and verification by letting the draft model predict likely verification outcomes ahead of time so verified tokens can be returned immediately when predictions match.

notes: 主贡献是 Saguaro SSD 算法的推理流程改进，直接属于解码策略优化。

general: Serving large language models (LLMs) at scale necessitates efficient key-value (KV) cache management.
We present KVTC, a lightweight transform coder that compresses KV caches for compact on-GPU and off-GPU storage.
上下文与缓存优化: KVTC combines PCA-based feature decorrelation, adaptive quantization, and entropy coding to compress KV caches while leaving model parameters unchanged.

By exploiting redundancies in KV caches, KVTC achieves up to 20x compression without harming long-context accuracy, making it a practical building block for memory-efficient LLM serving with reusable KV caches.

notes: Positive tier because KV cache compression is the main contribution and its impact on cache reuse is highlighted.

general: We introduce GateSkip, a simple residual-stream gating mechanism that enables token-wise layer skipping in decoder-only LMs, ranking tokens by the gate and skipping low-importance ones using a per-layer budget to save up to 15% compute while retaining >90% accuracy.
The method fits smoothly on pretrained models and combines easily with quantization, pruning, and self-speculative decoding, giving insight into transformer information flow.
模型结构侧推理优化: Each Attention/MLP branch gets a sigmoid-linear gate that compresses the branch’s output before it re-enters the residual stream, enabling token-wise layer skipping during inference with a learned gate budget and stable fine-tuning on top of pretrained models.

notes: GateSkip’s main contribution is the residual gating structure that adaptively skips layers per token, so model-structure-level inference optimization is the clearest positive signal.

general: Portcullis is a privacy-preserving gateway that anonymizes prompts, securely interacts with third-party LLMs, reconstructs responses, and runs in encrypted memory to ensure trustworthiness.

notes: Focuses on privacy gateway design rather than any decoding/context/system optimization.

上下文与缓存优化: HiRED leverages the attention of the CLS token in the vision transformer to assess each partition and allocate an optimal token budget before selecting the most informative visual tokens to forward to the LLM.

notes: Token-dropping within a fixed budget trades off visual-token count to boost throughput, latency, and memory efficiency for high-resolution VLM inference.

general: Abstract introduces Infinite Pixel Learning (IPL) to fuse UHD multi-exposure dynamic scenes in real time on a single consumer-grade GPU by slicing input sequences, adding an attention cache, and compressing that cache to manage the long-sequence data stream.
上下文与缓存优化: The method develops an attention cache analogous to the KV cache for processing an infinite data stream and explicitly adds attention cache compression to reduce the cache storage burden on the device while keeping UHD fusion real-time (>40 fps).

notes: 命中上下文与缓存优化是因为摘要明确把 attention cache 和其压缩作为主要贡献，直接对应本偏好标签。

general: Abstract: MatDuck uses ClassDefinition-Style Descriptor generation and code-style in-context learning to evoke material knowledge within LLMs for zero-shot materials-science text mining.

Abstract reports an 11.3% zero-shot improvement across seven MSTM tasks via this plug-and-play prompting method, without introducing decoding, cache, system, kernel, structure, or compression optimizations.

notes: The paper focuses on prompting strategies for LLM-based zero-shot materials science text mining rather than any of the specified system/optimization axes.

general: 提出一种不需训练的文本信息引导的动态视觉 token 恢复机制，通过问题文本与视觉 token 相似度为大模态模型恢复重要 token、合并次要 token，从而在保持性能的前提下压缩 token 数量。
上下文与缓存优化: 该机制利用文本与视觉 token 的相似度找出有意义的 token 并与其相关的文本信息匹配，同时合并其他不重要 token，使视觉 token 平均压缩到原始数量的 10% 左右，直接减轻多模态模型的上下文负担。

notes: 主席目的是在大模态模型推理阶段通过文本引导的 token 重构减少上下文规模，提升效率。

general: Real-time Monte Carlo ray tracing with low sampling rates demands a denoising algorithm that balances quality and efficiency, motivating this work.
RAKD combines auxiliary unlabeled data, GAN-based adversarial learning, and parameter transfer to distill knowledge so the student model keeps high-frequency detail while cutting low-frequency noise.
模型压缩: Previous works focus on denoising architecture while ignoring model compression, so RAKD explicitly distills knowledge to produce a compact student that meets real-time constraints.

notes: 聚焦通过知识蒸馏压缩模型以同时维持实时性能与质量，符合模型压缩偏好标签。

模型压缩: Abstract frames the contribution as a pruning/sparsification method: it introduces customized Visual Prompts in the VPNs framework to upgrade neural network sparsification and reports substantial gains over state-of-the-art pruning algorithms across architectures and datasets.
general: The paper adopts a novel data-model co-design perspective to jointly learn important model topology and input data so as to promote superior weight sparsity, with systematic investigations of how different visual prompts impact model pruning.

notes: The work targets vision-model sparsification via data-model co-design rather than serving/system optimization, so only the 模型压缩 label is supported by the abstract evidence.

general: The abstract focuses on Neural Block Compression, a multi-resolution texture compression scheme tailored for high-quality rendering on memory/bandwidth-constrained devices, without emphasizing any of the listed preference optimizations.

notes: Texture feature compression is the main contribution, so it defaults to a conservative negative tier with no preference labels.

general: Dynamic quantization expands heavy SR models onto mobile devices by adaptively allocating bits per layer and patch while maintaining SR accuracy.
Granular-DQ builds a granularity-bit controller and fine-grained soft gate to dynamically allocate bit-widths based on patch statistics, emphasizing efficiency–accuracy trade-offs.
模型压缩: Granular-DQ’s dynamic quantization paradigm adjusts patch-wise and layer-invariant bit-widths, addressing quantization efficiency and inter-layer relationship disturbance for SR models.

notes: 专注于图像超分辨率模型的尺度/局部动态量化，属于量化压缩范畴，与多粒度上下文信息结合来提高效率和精度。

negative: 摘要只说明面向实时图形的轻量级超分辨率以减少计算资源，但未具体描述解码策略、缓存、系统调度、算子/内核、结构推理或模型压缩等明确优化方法。

notes: 摘要侧重应用场景与资源压力，未给出明确的偏好标签对应贡献。

general: Abstract focuses on incremental object detection and addressing recognition/localization imbalance via a localization-then-recognition strategy and semantic guidance, without claiming decoding, system, kernel, structure, or compression optimizations.

notes: Contributions remain on task-level pipeline improvements for object detection, so no preference label applies.

general: RetouchGPT uses LLM-guided imperfection prediction and prompt-driven feature modification within transformer blocks to enable interactive face retouching.
Abstract focuses on multi-modal prompt design and image enhancement performance, without introducing new decoding/context/system/kernel/model-compression optimizations.

notes: Summary indicates CV-focused interactive retouching; no explicit preference-label optimizations supported by the abstract.

general: ST3 consists of Progressive Visual Token Pruning (PVTP) to eliminate inattentive visual tokens and Visual Token Annealing (VTA) to dynamically reduce visual tokens per layer, delivering ~2× faster inference while using ~30% KV cache memory compared to original LLaVA.
上下文与缓存优化: PVTP removes redundant visual tokens across layers and VTA shrinks token count as generation progresses, directly trimming the KV cache footprint and accelerating inference without retraining.

notes: 根据摘要的主要贡献判断，对应上下文/缓存优化标签。

general: UKMP 面向 LVLM 设计结构化剪枝，并通过统一知识维持重要度和适配模态/模块的平衡正则化来减少存储和计算开销的同时保留能力。([chatpaper.com](https://chatpaper.com/ja/chatpaper/paper/160239))
模型压缩: 论文以 UKMI 重要度估计配合权重再调用和 LoRA 进而逐步蒸馏的结构化剪枝恢复为核心压缩方法，直接面向模型参数的减少与重构。([chatpaper.com](https://chatpaper.com/ja/chatpaper/paper/160239))

notes: ['LoRA-based progressive distillation 用于重新恢复被剪裁权重，以保持压缩后 LVLM 的性能。([chatpaper.com](https://chatpaper.com/ja/chatpaper/paper/160239))']

general: OAC: Output-adaptive Calibration for Accurate Post-training Quantization 主要在部署 LLM 时缓解计算成本，通过 PTQ 压缩模型以减少推理的内存、延迟和能耗，并以输出交叉熵失真构建量化误差。
模型压缩: 摘要指出大多数 PTQ 仅依层欧式损失计算误差，OAC 则引入输出自适应 Hessian 更新权重与检测关键权重，从而缓解低精度（如 2-bit / 二值）量化导致的精度下降，这明确是 PTQ/量化类模型压缩贡献。

notes: 主要贡献在于 PTQ 梯度/输出驱动的校准机制，显式优化模型压缩精度。

general: MPQ-DM targets diffusion models in resource-constrained scenarios by defining a mixed-precision quantization pipeline that keeps 2–4 bit models accurate despite heavy discretization.
模型压缩: Outlier-Driven Mixed Quantization quantifies outlier channels with kurtosis to allocate intra-layer bit-widths and Time-Smoothed Relation Distillation aligns quantized and full-precision latents, enabling significant FID gains under extremely low bit-width settings.

notes: Quantization-centric contributions are framed as the primary optimization for low-bit diffusion deployment.

上下文与缓存优化: Token compression techniques, such as token merging and pruning, are essential for alleviating the substantial computational burden caused by the proliferation of tokens within attention mechanisms.
The proposed method leverages a multimodal, prompt-centric methodology...to efficiently eliminate redundant tokens while preserving those rich in information.
When applied to multimodal diffusion models, MPTM maintains high-quality output while achieving a 2.9-fold increase in throughput, highlighting its versatility.

notes: 摘要强调通过多模态 prompt 感知的 token 合并来减少冗余 token、保留有效信息，并显著提升 diffusion 生成任务的吞吐，直接支撑上下文/缓存优化。

general: BigMac introduces a communication-efficient MoE structure aimed at reducing the All-to-All overhead that currently bottlenecks fine-grained MoE deployments during training and inference.
系统与调度优化: The abstract emphasizes that the All-to-All communication becomes a bottleneck especially when more experts are involved in fine-grained structures, and BigMac targets that heavier communication overhead to speed up training and inference.

notes: The work centers on reducing MoE communication cost so training/inference can run faster, which is a system/scheduling optimization.

general: LoRA-based quantization error compensation (LQEC) has been used to recover accuracy in compressed LLMs, and RILQ boosts 2-bit LLM accuracy using rank-insensitive loss to adjust adapters across layers.
模型压缩: RILQ enables adapter-merged weight-quantized LLM inference with significantly enhanced accuracy while remaining computationally efficient compared to existing LoRA methods.

notes: “RILQ” focuses on improving quantized LLM inference rather than introducing a new decoding/system technique.

general: Introduce Singular Value Scaling (SVS) to refine pruned weights for GAN and Diffusion models, improving initialization and speeding fine-tuning without extra training costs.
模型压缩: SVS minimizes disparities between singular values of pruned weights to guide compressed generative models toward better solutions, boosting compression performance across StyleGAN2/3 and DDPM.

This paper focuses on compressing decoder-only transformer-based autoregressive models through structural weight pruning to improve the model efficiency while preserving performance for both language and image generation tasks.
Specifically, we propose a training-free pruning method that calculates a numerical score with Newton's method for the Attention and MLP modules, respectively.

notes: 训练免费结构化剪枝和补偿算法面向自回归 Transformer，提高语言与图像生成的推理效率与显存。

general: ScaleOT frames privacy-utility-scalable offsite tuning by sharing compressed emulators composed of selected original layers and lightweight harmonizers so data owners can tune downstream tasks while keeping both model and data private.
模型压缩: ScaleOT’s layerwise lossy compression uses reinforcement learning to assess each layer’s importance and swaps in harmonizers, enabling tailored emulators across scales.
A selective rank reduction method further compresses original LLM layers to boost privacy with negligible utility degradation, matching full fine-tuning performance.

notes: Layer-aware compression plus rank reduction targets privacy-heavy LLM tuning; harmonizers blend original layers with lightweight replacements under RL guidance.

模型压缩: Abstract describes ABQ-LLM’s arbitrary-bit PTQ pipeline, including distribution correction, bit balance, and a BTC-based quantization acceleration framework that mitigates low-bit degradation while enabling efficient GPU inference beyond INT4/INT8 limits, showing the paper’s core contribution is compression-focused inference optimization. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08554?utm_source=openai))

notes: ['Paper reports W2*A8 on LLaMA-7B with WikiText2 perplexity 7.59 and highlights 1.6× speedup plus 2.7× memory compression versus SmoothQuant thanks to the proposed quantization/acceleration stack, reinforcing the compression-acceleration focus. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.08554?utm_source=openai)) ([huggingface.co](https://huggingface.co/papers/2408.08554?utm_source=openai))']

general: 摘要指出量化压缩大模型会引入精度损失，但作者发现在量化丢弃的权重中蕴含可提升精度的‘treasures’，并构造补偿框架融合这些权重以改善 LLM 的精度。
模型压缩: 提出的 plug-and-play 权重补偿框架可与各种 LLM 量化算法结合在不增加推理开销的前提下提高精度，直接为模型压缩优化提供了新方法。

notes: 压缩方法用 discarded weights 的搜索空间与补偿策略提升低比特量化精度。

general: Apollo-Forecast pairs an Anti-Aliasing Quantization Module with a Race Decoding technique to tackle aliasing distortion and long inference times when applying language models to time-series forecasting, delivering 1.9X–2.7X faster inference than baselines while improving zero-shot metrics such as WQL and MASE by 35.41% and 18.99%. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12226))
模型压缩: The Anti-Aliasing Quantization Module encodes sequences into tokens while reducing high-frequency noise in the signals, thereby improving signal fidelity and quantization efficiency. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12226))
解码策略优化: Race Decoding runs a draft model to enable parallel processing and results integration, markedly accelerating inference speed for long-term predictions, especially on large-scale models. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12226))

notes: AAQM and RD are presented as the framework’s two main contributions, so both compression and decoding-strategy optimizations are justified by the abstract’s emphasis on those methods. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12226))

general: Channel Merging聚类并离线合并高度相似的通道参数，推理时只需从合并组中快速查表即可保留专业能力，实验证明用53%参数也能匹配未合并模型甚至等效集成。
模型压缩: 模型合并策略将多个专门化模型压缩成单一模型、显著降低推理的内存占用；Channel Merging在分组内部仅合并非常相似的参数，最小化冲突且提升存储效率。

notes: 方法核心是将多个LLM专家压缩为一个合并模型，既减小参数量又保持性能，直接命中模型压缩偏好。

general: ASER targets low-bit quantization of LLMs using layer-wise error reconstruction and activation smoothing to preserve accuracy in W4A8 setups.
模型压缩: The paper frames ASER as a model compression objective, building LoRA-style matrices and activation smoothing to compensate quantization error and enable competitive low-bit LLM quantization.

notes: ASER combines low-rank error reconstruction and activation smoothing to keep accuracy for post-training quantized LLMs.

general: introducing Dynamic Operator Optimization (Dop) that dynamically optimizes the Segmented Gather Matrix-Vector Multiplication (SGMV) operator for different LoRA serving scenarios, leveraging a hierarchical search space and evolutionary Optimization Engine guided by a cost model so the SGMV implementations can adapt and stay high-performance, yielding 1.30-1.46× throughput improvements for multi-tenant LoRA serving.
算子与内核优化: Dop’s core contribution is automated, scenario-aware optimization of the SGMV operator—including structural sketches, implementation diversity, and a performance-guided evolutionary engine—demonstrating substantial throughput gains for multi-tenant LoRA serving.

notes: 算子级的动态优化是该工作的主贡献，服务效率提升作为该内核优化的结果。

general: Falcon is a semi-autoregressive speculative decoding framework that balances drafting latency and speculation accuracy to accelerate LLM inference.
解码策略优化: Custom-Designed Decoding Tree generates multiple tokens per forward pass while Coupled Sequential Glancing Distillation strengthens same-block dependencies to boost acceptance.

notes: ['Reports lossless speedup ratios of 2.91x–3.51x on Vicuna and LLaMA2-Chat versus prior speculative decoding baselines.']

general: We propose Adaptive Sparse Trainer (AST), a novel retraining framework tailored for semi-structured sparse models that learns optimal masks during weight updates, integrates knowledge distillation, and adds well-initialized parameters to improve compressed model performance.

AST reduces the perplexity and zero-shot accuracy gap between dense and 2:4 semi-structured sparse LLaMA2-7B models while using minimal pretraining tokens and GPU hours, demonstrating feasibility of deploying semi-structured sparse LLMs.
Abstract describes RTLIR as a Reinforced Token-Level Input Refinement that learns to select which tokens to keep before invoking an LLM, improving accuracy across tasks.

notes: This paper focuses on token-level input selection for LLMs rather than any of the six specified optimization categories, so no preference label applies.

解码策略优化: 摘要描述将自回归解码扩展为多分支草稿流程，使LLM在一次前向推理中可并行生成多个标记（2.0~3.2 tokens/step），从而实现约 2 倍的端到端吞吐提升。

general: Generating Chain-of-Thought (CoT) before deriving the answer can effectively improve reasoning capabilities of LLMs, but longer CoTs incur extra decoding costs and are problematic for latency-sensitive applications such as search and recommendation.
解码策略优化: C3oT compresses an original longer CoT into a shorter one while preserving key information, trains LLMs conditioned on both lengths, and performs conditioned inference so the model learns to emit shorter CoTs with similar effectiveness, explicitly reducing decoding length and cost.

notes: 摘要显示主要贡献在压缩推理链长度以节省解码成本，因此归入“解码策略优化”。

上下文与缓存优化: Serving LLMs requires substantial KV cache memory that grows with sequence length, so QJL compresses the cache via a Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform plus sign-bit quantization, eliminating per-block constants and reducing KV cache size fivefold to 3 bits without hurting accuracy.

notes: 主要贡献是去除量化常数、直接压缩 KV cache，从而显著节省内存并保持精度，CUDA kernel 只是实现细节支持。

general: The emergence of long-context text applications utilizing large language models (LLMs) has presented significant scalability challenges, particularly in memory footprint.
The linear growth of the Key-Value (KV) cache ... can significantly increase memory usage and may prevent models from functioning properly in memory-constrained environments.
上下文与缓存优化: We propose Cache Sparse Representation (CSR), which converts the dense Key-Value cache tensor into sparse indexes and weights, offering a more memory-efficient representation during LLM inference.
Our extensive experiments demonstrate that CSR matches the performance of state-of-the-art KV cache quantization algorithms while ensuring robust functionality in memory-constrained environments.

notes: CSR focuses on reducing KV cache memory via sparse representation and neural dictionary generation for LLM inference.

general: Hierarchical Context Pruning (HCP) constructs completion prompts that keep length around 8k tokens instead of the full ~50k-token repository context, improving repository-level code completion accuracy and throughput.
上下文与缓存优化: HCP strategically prunes repository-level prompts so Code LLMs can handle longer dependencies without exceeding the context window, leading to better accuracy on CrossCodeEval.

notes: HCP focuses on prompt-level context trimming to stay within feasible window sizes while retaining relevant cross-file information.

general: Abstract highlights dynamic-width speculative beam decoding (DSBD) as a fusion of speculative decoding and beam sampling that trades off efficiency, accuracy, and memory to improve LLM inference quality and throughput. ([vast.cs.ucla.edu](https://vast.cs.ucla.edu/sites/default/files/publications/Zongyue%20Qin%20et%20al_AAAI%202025_34690-Article%20Text-38757-1-2-20250410.pdf))
解码策略优化: DSBD dynamically tunes beam counts per context, introduces a forest-based parallel verification scheme, and alters the draft/verification pipeline so the auxiliary model can generate and validate multiple beams at once, directly targeting token-generation behavior for speed and quality gains. ([vast.cs.ucla.edu](https://vast.cs.ucla.edu/sites/default/files/publications/Zongyue%20Qin%20et%20al_AAAI%202025_34690-Article%20Text-38757-1-2-20250410.pdf))

notes: Reports 1.5-1.9× speed-up and 1.8-2.5× energy reduction over beam sampling without degrading downstream performance, confirming the decoding-focused benefits. ([vast.cs.ucla.edu](https://vast.cs.ucla.edu/sites/default/files/publications/Zongyue%20Qin%20et%20al_AAAI%202025_34690-Article%20Text-38757-1-2-20250410.pdf))

general: Prompt compression is increasingly studied for its potential to reduce computational costs and alleviate the burden on language models when processing lengthy prompts.

Prior research assessed token retention and removal by calculating information entropy but faces challenges because semantic significance of tokens is context-dependent, making independent retention decisions inadequate.
上下文与缓存优化: The paper treats prompt compression as a way to reduce computation and handle long-context prompts, highlighting that typical token retention strategies need refinement due to context-dependent semantics.

notes: Work pushes prompt compression for long-context LLMs, suggesting new metrics and context-aware retention to better manage prompt cache/attention costs.

模型压缩: talk introduces compression-aware computing, a framework enabling AI models to recognize and adapt to their compressed states while preserving performance, integrating compression techniques like sparsification, quantization, and low-rank decomposition to enhance efficiency and accuracy

notes: Focus is on compression-aware methods that adapt generative AI models for memory- and energy-constrained devices.

general: I will present theoretically-guaranteed scalable and efficient probabilistic inference ... introduce a new compute paradigm ... that leverages modern accelerators, specifically low-precision and sparsity, to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy.
模型压缩: Introduce a new compute paradigm for probabilistic inference that leverages modern accelerators, specifically low-precision and sparsity, to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy.

notes: Abstract emphasizes a compression-style compute paradigm (low-precision and sparsity) as the main efficiency contribution.

general: Title: Not All Bits Are Equal: How Model Scale Changes Memory-Optimal Reasoning

Abstract: While 4-bit quantization has emerged as a memory-optimal choice for non-reasoning models and zero-shot tasks across scales, we show that this universal prescription fails for reasoning models, where KV cache rather than model size can dominate memory.
negative: Abstract frames the work as a diagnosis of when quantization vs KV cache dominates memory for reasoning models rather than the introduction and validation of a new optimization technique, so no preference label is clearly supported.

notes: Characterizes memory trade-offs in LLM reasoning rather than proposing a new optimization, so it does not hit any of the preferred optimization labels.

general: Abstract describes tracing attention sinks and compression valleys to massive activations, proving theoretical bounds, and proposing a Mix-Compress-Refine theory to explain information flow without introducing a new optimization technique.

notes: Paper offers a theoretical/unified explanation of emergent phenomena rather than a concrete optimization contribution.

general: LLM inference is memory-heavy because of large KV caches, and NSNQuant introduces calibration-free low-bit vector quantization that applies Normalize-Shift-Normalize with a Hadamard transform to align tokens to a standard normal, enabling robust quantization with reusable codebooks and throughput gains. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: NSNQuant directly quantizes the KV cache without calibration, reducing its memory footprint while delivering up to 3× higher throughput than full-precision baselines. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))
