notes: The paper’s core contribution is a calibration-free pipeline for compressing the KV cache, so the cache/context optimization label is well-supported. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))

general: Accelerating large language model (LLM) inference is critical for real-world deployments requiring high throughput and low latency.
算子与内核优化: We develop Selective Head Attention with hardware-efficient, sparsity-aware GPU kernels, delivering up to 2.2× end-to-end speedups for models like OPT, LLaMA-2 & 3, Qwen, Mistral across various batch sizes and sequence lengths without compromising accuracy.
模型结构侧推理优化: Polar Sparsity introduces Selective Head Attention, highlighting a shift where attention head sparsity remains stable even as batch size and sequence length grow, allowing contextual sparsity to scale effectively.

notes: Polar Sparsity proves contextual sparsity can scale to large batches by focusing on sparse attention heads and matching kernel support, enabling practical high-throughput LLM deployment.

general: DuoAttention splits attention heads into Retrieval and Streaming types, applying a full KV cache only to retrieval heads while streaming heads use a lightweight constant-length cache, which cuts decoding and pre-filling memory/latency for long-context LLMs. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5c1ddd2e59df46fd2aa85c833b1b36ed-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: By retaining full KV states for the small set of retrieval heads and tiny caches for streaming heads, DuoAttention reduces memory up to 2.55× while speeding decoding/pre-filling and preserving long-context capabilities. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5c1ddd2e59df46fd2aa85c833b1b36ed-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

notes: By retaining full KV states for the small set of retrieval heads and tiny caches for streaming heads, DuoAttention reduces memory up to 2.55× and speeds decoding/pre-filling while preserving long-context capability, enabling Llama-3-8B to reach 3.33M tokens on one A100. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5c1ddd2e59df46fd2aa85c833b1b36ed-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

general: The paper introduces cascading sub-cache buffers to selectively retain the most relevant tokens, letting the model keep longer context histories without increasing cache size and reducing prefill latency by 6.8× compared to flash attention on 1M tokens.
上下文与缓存优化: We introduce a novel mechanism that leverages cascading sub-cache buffers to selectively retain the most relevant tokens, enabling the model to maintain longer context histories without increasing the cache size.

notes: Only the context/cache optimization is supported by the abstract as a core contribution, so other preference labels were excluded.

模型压缩: Neural network pruning is a promising technique to mitigate the excessive computational and memory requirements of large language models (LLMs).

general: Bottlenecked Transformer augments a decoder-only LLM with a lightweight Cache Processor that performs periodic, non-causal, in-place KV rewrites at reasoning step boundaries.

The processor consolidates recent KV entries and reconsolidates a top-k attention-selected set of prior entries conditioned on recent context, explicitly framing the work as KV cache consolidation/reconsolidation.

notes: Cache consolidation via periodic in-place KV rewrites yields consistent reasoning improvements across multiple mathematical benchmarks and backbone transformers.

general: Achieving high-fidelity audio compression while preserving perceptual quality across diverse audio types remains a significant challenge in Neural Audio Coding; MUFFIN introduces psychoacoustically guided multi-band frequency reconstruction to optimize bitrate allocation and fidelity.
模型压缩: Multi-Band Spectral Residual Vector Quantization quantizes latent speech across different frequency bands to allocate bitrate efficiently and preserve reconstruction quality, establishing MUFFIN as a neural psychoacoustic coding system.

notes: Extensive evaluations on LibriTTS, IEMOCAP, GTZAN, and BBC show MUFFIN surpasses prior neural audio codecs, and a high-compression variant reaches 12.5 kHz while retaining quality.

general: 论文提出在推理过程中通过多臂老虎机算法训练-free地动态调节 speculative decoding 的超参数，旨在保持 LLM 的生成质量同时提升吞吐。
解码策略优化: BanditSpec 以在线上下文为基础，分别设计 UCBSpec 和 EXP3Spec 两个带有停止时间 regret 分析的 bandit 算法，专门用来优化 speculative decoding 的配置以应对多样的 prompt。

notes: 仅在推理阶段调整 speculative decoding 配置的在线 bandit 策略，是主要贡献；未引用其他优化标签。

general: Abstract describes a serving system for multi-tenant MoE LLMs that reduces memory via similarity-based expert consolidation and runtime partial reconfiguration while keeping throughput comparable to serving a single model and TTFT overhead low.
系统与调度优化: The system shares similar experts across fine-tuned MoE LLMs and dynamically replaces non-expert layers per request so multiple models can run on one GPU with competitive output quality and an 85% reduction in turnaround time versus MIG.

notes: Focused on serving multiple MoE LLMs on a single GPU via consolidation and runtime reconfiguration.

general: SCBench introduces a comprehensive benchmark focused on evaluating long-context methods from a KV cache perspective (generation, compression, retrieval, loading) rather than delivering a novel optimization method.

The abstract frames the work as an extensive analysis of existing long-context solutions and draws conclusions about their memory/computation behavior, showing it is an evaluation/benchmark study instead of proposing a new contribution for the listed preference labels.

notes: Benchmark/analysis work, so no new optimization aligned with the required labels.

general: Speculative sampling for autoregressive decoding uses a cheap draft model plus verification, and this work gives the first multi-draft algorithm that hits 90% acceptance while keeping overhead under 100 ms per token.
解码策略优化: Reformulating optimal transport for multi-draft speculative sampling via convex optimization yields an algorithm that maximizes acceptance probability over n draft tokens drawn i.i.d., directly improving the decoding strategy without degrading the target distribution.

notes: Highlights a novel convex optimization reduction that makes optimal multi-draft speculative decoding practical, including theoretical OT→max-flow steps and empirical top-k tuning.

general: prima.cpp introduces pipelined-ring parallelism (PRP) to overlap disk I/O with compute and communication and resolves the prefetch-release conflict in mmap-based offloading, enabling 30-70B LLMs to run on consumer home clusters with limited RAM/VRAM and slow disks.
系统与调度优化: Halda, a heterogeneity-aware scheduler, co-optimizes per-device CPU/GPU workloads and device selection under RAM/VRAM constraints to keep the distributed on-device inference system performant across mixed hardware.

notes: 重点是通过 PRP 以及 Halda 调度方案缓解低资源、异构设备上的 LLM 推理瓶颈，实现 30-70B 模型在家用集群上的高吞吐。

general: InfiniPot-V is a training-free, query-agnostic framework that enforces a hard, length-independent memory cap for streaming video understanding by monitoring the KV cache during encoding, cutting peak GPU memory by up to 94% while maintaining real-time generation and full-cache accuracy even in multi-turn dialogues.
上下文与缓存优化: Once the cache reaches a user-set threshold, InfiniPot-V runs a lightweight compression pass that removes temporally redundant tokens via the TaR metric and retains semantically significant tokens via Value-Norm ranking, dissolving the KV cache bottleneck without retraining or query knowledge.

general: Mixture Compressor for Mixture-of-Experts LLMs Gains More 提出 MC，组合静态量化与动态剪枝以在推理阶段极限压缩 MoE-LLM，目标是降低专家参数的存储/加载开销并保持性能。
模型压缩: Pre-Loading Mixed-Precision Quantization（PMQ）通过线性规划自适应分配各专家的比特宽度以缓解存储与加载瓶颈。
Online Dynamic Pruning（ODP）在推理过程中鉴别重要 token 并动态选择专家以减少激活参数，配合静态量化实现更极端的压缩。

notes: Compression via PMQ+ODP keeps accuracy drops low while cutting activated parameters and overall model bits.

general: OSCAR 是一种查询依赖的在线软压缩方法，在推理时动态压缩检索到的信息，避免存储开销并提高压缩率。
上下文与缓存优化: OSCAR 通过在 RAG 推理阶段动态压缩检索信息以获得 2-5 倍的推理加速，同时保持准确率。

notes: 摘要明确提出在 RAG 推理阶段对检索上下文做在线压缩作为主要贡献，因此归为上下文与缓存优化。

上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: Dynamic-LLaVA dynamically sparsifies vision-language context during prefill and decoding, halving decoding computation and KV-cache memory.

notes: Covers both prefill and decoding modes to maintain generation quality while improving efficiency.

general: ProtoKV separately processes position-determined tokens and semantic-anchored tokens to form prototype-based clusters for KV cache compression, aiming to preserve semantic integrity while staying efficient.
Experiments on LongBench show ProtoKV outperforms prior methods under the same memory constraints, signaling a cache-compression optimization contribution.

notes: Focus is on long-context KV cache compression for LLM inference, so the paper delivers a clear context/cache optimization method.

general: MPCache proposes an MPC-friendly KV cache eviction framework to cut latency for private long-sequence LLM inference while preserving privacy guarantees.
上下文与缓存优化: MPCache uses a static eviction pass to discard unimportant KV cache entries plus a query-aware dynamic selector that activates only a small subset of KV cache for each attention step, along with clustering and index sharing to make the dynamic selection efficient.

general: 摘要指出 Dobi-SVD 提出新的可微 SVD 流程，分析权重/激活截断，并提出方法解决截断位置、快速更新矩阵和注入损失问题，目的在于 LLM 压缩。
模型压缩: 论文强调用 SVD 实现 LLM 压缩，Dobi-SVD 解决截断位置与信息注入损失，是主要贡献。

notes: 摘要聚焦于压缩优化，未体现其他偏好标签。

模型压缩: Abstract describes GlowQ as a group-shared low-rank approximation for quantized LLMs that caches a single shared right factor per input-sharing group and restores only the groups or layers yielding the highest accuracy benefit, addressing accuracy degradation introduced by low-bit quantization.

notes: GlowQ selectively restores accuracy-critical groups/layers while sharing low-rank factors to keep latency and memory overhead low.

general: EvoPress targets accurate dynamic model compression for large language models via evolutionary search and per-layer adjustments.
模型压缩: Abstract highlights dynamic, non-uniform compression that adjusts sparsity per-block or per-layer to minimize accuracy loss while enforcing a global compression threshold, evidencing a primary contribution in model compression.

notes: EvoPress proposes evolutionary search to tune per-block/layer sparsity levels for LLM compression, so the core contribution aligns with model compression optimization.

general: Abstract explains CAS-Spec builds multi-level self-speculative draft models via DSIA strategies (layer sparsity and activation quantization) and DyTC adaptive routing, delivering 1.1×–2.3× speedups with 47%–48% gains over cascade/tree baselines for LLMs, confirming a lossless inference acceleration focus on token generation.

The method dynamically routes the draft hierarchy and assigns draft lengths based on acceptance rates and latency prediction heuristics, emphasizing runtime decoding control rather than auxiliary hardware/system changes.
解码策略优化: CAS-Spec is presented as Cascade Adaptive Self-Speculative Decoding that constructs speculative draft stages from the single target model and routes them via DyTC, clearly targeting speculative decoding/token generation flow to improve throughput while remaining on-the-fly and training-free.

notes: Targets training-free on-the-fly LLM inference acceleration by reusing the target model with layer sparsity and activation quantization DSIA heuristics, avoiding additional draft models and adapting draft lengths via DyTC for runtime decoding control.

general: 提出静态 8-bit per-tensor SSM 量化，针对 selective scan 输入激活和输出 outlier 进行处理，使得大型 SSM 在云端与边缘设备上保持准确率的同时更易部署。
量化后的 Mamba 2.8B 与 Jamba 52B 在 NVIDIA Orin Nano 8G 与更大模型上分别实现了 1.72× 的推理延迟提升和约 1% 的精度降幅，说明方法可扩展。
模型压缩: 通过抑制 selective SSM 的输入峰值并在 Hadamard 变换空间量化输出激活，开发了专门针对 SSM 的 8-bit 权重-激活量化方案，并利用硬件加速进一步降低延迟。

notes: 聚焦 SSM 量化以提升 LLM 推理效率，保持准确率的同时适配云边部署。

general: Preble 是首个面向 prompt 共享的分布式 LLM serving 平台，旨在通过 prompt 复用降低长 prompt 请求的延迟。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00023))
上下文与缓存优化: 摘要指出 Preble 设计的分布式调度系统联合优化 KV 状态复用与算力负载，以实现 prompt 共享的复用。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00023))
系统与调度优化: 同段摘要进一步说明新调度算法与分层调度机制在兼顾负载均衡与 KV 重用方面发挥核心作用。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00023))

notes: E2 调度算法在 4-8 GPU 集群上将 avg latency 提升 1.5-14.5×、p99 latency 提升 2-10×，体现 prompt-aware load balancing 与共享策略的配合价值。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00023))

general: EPD Disaggregation decouples encoding, prefill, and decode into dedicated resources for LMM serving and demonstrates major gains in memory, batch size, KV cache capacity, and SLO/TTFT compared to monolithic systems.
上下文与缓存优化: The framework “caches multimedia tokens for efficient transfer” and delivers “2.2× larger KV caches,” highlighting explicit context/cache management aimed at inference efficiency.
系统与调度优化: EPD Disaggregation introduces “a module for optimal resource allocation for disaggregated serving” plus “a novel role-switching method to handle changing workload characteristics,” signaling new system/scheduling mechanisms.
It “separates the encoding, prefill, and decode stages onto dedicated resources” and “parallelizes the encoding load within a request,” showing serving-level orchestration improvements.

general: ShadowKV stores a low-rank key cache and offloads the value cache to shrink the memory footprint for longer sequences and larger batches, then uses an accurate KV selection strategy to reconstruct minimal sparse KV pairs on the fly.
上下文与缓存优化: Storing the low-rank key cache while offloading the value cache reduces the KV cache memory footprint, enabling up to 6× larger batch sizes and 3.04× higher throughput without accuracy loss.

notes: Focus is on optimizing KV cache management for long-context LLM inference to increase throughput and batch size.

general: Post-training quantization techniques applied to weights, activations, and the KV cache greatly reduce memory usage, latency, and power consumption of Large Language Models while learned rotations help remove outliers and benefit quantization.

SpinQuant incorporates learned rotation matrices for optimal quantized network accuracy, narrowing the accuracy gap on zero-shot reasoning tasks to 2.9 points (LLaMA-2 7B) and outperforming prior quantization baselines.
模型压缩: With 4-bit quantization of weight, activation, and KV-cache, SpinQuant narrows the accuracy gap on zero-shot reasoning tasks with full precision to merely 2.9 points on the LLaMA-2 7B model, surpassing LLM-QAT by 19.1 points and SmoothQuant by 25.0 points.

notes: SpinQuant is a learned-rotation PTQ method that significantly improves quantization accuracy for LLMs, making it a clear model-compression contribution.

general: ThinK introduces query-dependent KV cache pruning to cut long-context LLM inference memory costs by over 20% while maintaining or improving quality, enabling larger batches on a single GPU. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.21018?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: ThinK selectively prunes the least significant KV cache channels per query by exploiting channel redundancy and minimizing attention weight loss, shrinking the KV cache without degrading inference accuracy. ([nips.cc](https://nips.cc/virtual/2024/106437?utm_source=openai))

notes: Focuses on KV cache channel pruning for LLM inference efficiency in long-context scenarios.

上下文与缓存优化: Large-language-model inference with long contexts often produces key–value (KV) caches whose footprint exceeds GPU memory, so HiFC introduces a DRAM-free swapping scheme that stores KV pages on SSD pseudo-SLC regions and uses GPU Direct Storage for direct transfers, keeping throughput comparable to DRAM-based swapping while cutting memory expansion costs.

notes: HiFC’s primary contribution is a KV cache swapping system tailored for long-context LLM inference, so only 上下文与缓存优化 is supported by the abstract evidence.

general: GANQ is introduced as a GPU-adaptive non-uniform quantization framework for LLM deployment that reduces the perplexity gap versus FP16 and yields up to 2.57× inference speedup on an RTX 4090.
模型压缩: GANQ performs layer-wise post-training non-uniform quantization with a training-free GPU-adaptive optimization algorithm to minimize quantization errors for 3-bit and 4-bit weights, improving memory and inference efficiency.

general: DP-LLM introduces runtime adaptation for on-device LLMs by dynamically assigning layer-wise precision based on input values to manage latency and accuracy trade-offs.
Multi-scale quantization overlays multiple low-bitwidth variants so a single model can meet varying runtime constraints.
模型压缩: DP-LLM leverages mixed-precision quantization and layer-sensitive precision assignment to achieve a superior performance-latency trade-off compared to prior approaches.

notes: 论文聚焦在动态量化方案上，实现多尺度版本的混合精度模型以适应不同的延迟/精度需求，从而体现出主要的模型压缩贡献。

general: Memory and computation remain core bottlenecks in long-horizon LLM inference due to the quadratic cost of self-attention and the ever-growing key-value (KV) cache.
TRIM-KV is trained efficiently through distillation from a frozen LLM combined with a capacity loss, requiring only gate fine-tuning and adding negligible inference overhead.
上下文与缓存优化: We propose TRIM-KV, a novel approach that learns each token’s intrinsic importance at creation time via a lightweight retention gate...Tokens with low scores are evicted when the memory budget is exceeded, ensuring that the cache always contains the most critical tokens.

notes: 论文主要贡献是通过 retention gate 学习 token 重要性，在受限内存下更新 KV cache，有明确上下文/缓存优化方法论证。

general: title=EPIC: Efficient Position-Independent Caching for Serving Large Language Models
Context caching improves serving performance by reusing Key-Value (KV) vectors, the intermediate representations of tokens that are repeated across requests.

Existing context caching requires exact prefix matches across requests, limiting reuse in few-shot learning and retrieval-augmented generation where immutable content remains unchanged but is preceded by varying prefixes.
上下文与缓存优化: Position-Independent Caching (PIC) addresses this issue by enabling modular reuse of the KV vectors regardless of prefixes.
EPIC introduces the LegoLink algorithm to mitigate the inappropriate “attention sink” effect at every document beginning, maintaining accuracy with minimal computation.
EPIC achieves up to 8× improvements in Time-To-First-Token (TTFT) and 7× throughput gains over existing systems, with negligible or no accuracy loss.

notes: 核心贡献在于 LLM Serving 的位置无关 context cache，解决了 prefix mismatch 限制并通过 LegoLink 保障精度，是典型的上下文与缓存优化。

general: Spotlight Attention introduces non-linear hashing to optimize query/key embeddings, reducing the KV cache burden and improving retrieval precision while enabling much shorter hash codes.
The method is trained with a Bradley-Terry loss and evaluated on GPU-friendly workflows, showing a 5× shorter hash length and up to 3× throughput compared to vanilla decoding.
上下文与缓存优化: Reducing the key-value cache burden significantly accelerates inference, so the method dynamically selects critical KV caches during decoding instead of relying on inefficient random linear hashing.
Non-linear hashing functions improve coding efficiency and robustness for spotlighting important tokens in KV cache retrieval, directly targeting cache compression and retrieval precision.

notes: The paper’s core contribution is a KV cache selection mechanism for LLM inference, which justifies the single preference label.

primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: Multi model inference, where multiple task-specialized models collaborate to solve complex real-world problems, has recently emerged as a prominent paradigm, particularly in the development of agentic AI systems.
However, in such scenarios, each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.
上下文与缓存优化: However, in such scenarios, each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.

notes: 聚焦于多模型协同推理时的 KV cache 复用以节省内存。

general: NANOMIND decomposes LMMs into modular “bricks”, maps each to its ideal accelerator, and combines customized hardware, system-level scheduling, and low-bit kernels to run entirely on-device with higher throughput and power efficiency while bypassing CPU bottlenecks via token-aware buffer management. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))
系统与调度优化: The framework performs module-level dynamic offloading across accelerators on UMA SoCs and uses a layer-aware scheduler plus zero-copy buffer manager to make per-layer placement decisions based on battery, memory, and latency needs, immediately releasing resources after execution. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))

notes: The prototype runs LLaVA-OneVision-qwen2-05B for nearly 20.8 hours on battery, showing the practical effectiveness of the scheduling strategy. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))

general: 摘要描述 CommVQ 通过 additive quantization 和与 RoPE 交换性兼容的 codebook，压缩长上下文 LLM 推理的 KV cache，让 LLaMA-3.1 8B 在 RTX 4090 上支持 128K 上下文。
上下文与缓存优化: CommVQ 在 long-context benchmark 和 GSM8K 上实现 FP16 KV cache 缩小 87.5%（2-bit）并能在误差极小的情况下达到 1-bit，直接针对 KV cache 记忆瓶颈进行压缩优化。

notes: 仅依据给定摘要判定主要贡献。

上下文与缓存优化: Reducing visual redundancy at the image-encoder stage not only speeds up the encoder but also lightens the LLM workload, so we jointly optimize LVLM components and introduce a token-merging strategy that recycles useful information from discarded tokens, yielding up to 2× throughput and 4× prefilling speedups.
general: iLLaVA consistently improves both image and video understanding tasks and lets a larger model surpass a smaller one in accuracy and efficiency through the new merging steps, with detailed visualizations showing how each LVLM component supports efficient computation.

notes: iLLaVA’s encoder-stage token merging is explicitly presented as the key optimization to reduce input tokens entering the LLM while preserving accuracy, matching the long-context/cache optimization preference.

general: any4 是一个 learned 4-bit weight quantization 方案，支持任意数字表示且不需要预处理权重或激活，评估覆盖 Llama 2/3、Mistral、Mixtral 等多个模型家族，并开源了 tinygemm（GPU 高效查表矩阵乘库）来实现该方法。
模型压缩: 论文主要贡献是 any4 的 4-bit 权重量化，提供无需预处理的高准确率、多模型泛化、低位宽扩展（any3/any2），并可用单个 curated 样本完成校准，显式说明量化本身即是主要方法。

notes: tinygemm 提供了 GPU-高效的查表乘法以部署 any4，并与其他量化方法兼容。

general: Post-training compression reduces the computational and memory costs of large language models (LLMs), enabling resource-efficient deployment.
ACBench spans 12 tasks across 4 capabilities, 4-bit quantization (GPTQ, AWQ), and 50% pruning (Wanda, SparseGPT) while evaluating 15 models including distilled reasoning LLMs.
模型压缩: ACBench spans ... 4-bit quantization (GPTQ, AWQ) and 50% pruning (Wanda, SparseGPT), ... experiments reveal compression tradeoffs: 4-bit quantization preserves workflow generation and tool use (1%--3% drop) but degrades real-world application accuracy by 10%--15%, providing actionable insights for optimizing LLM compression in agentic scenarios.

notes: The paper introduces ACBench to evaluate quantization and pruning effects on LLM agentic capabilities and frames compression as the actionable optimization focus; no other preference label is supported by the abstract evidence.

general: Large Language Models face efficiency bottlenecks from ever-growing KV caches for long-context inference, motivating runtime eviction of non-critical cache elements while preserving generation quality.
上下文与缓存优化: Ada-KV introduces the first head-wise adaptive budget allocation for KV cache eviction, leveraging per-head attention patterns to guide cache reductions and integrating with existing eviction methods for consistent quality improvements.

notes: Ada-KV targets KV cache eviction so the main contribution is adapting cache budgets at the head level rather than system or compression tweaks.

general: Balanced Token Pruning (BTP) attacks the overhead of thousands of image tokens in LVLMs by using a calibration set to stage pruning decisions that balance downstream and local impacts across layers.
上下文与缓存优化: BTP explicitly reduces the number of image tokens and schedules pruning stages so early steps weigh effects on subsequent layers while later steps preserve local outputs, demonstrating a structured token-pruning strategy for broader LVLM efficiency.

notes: Approach emphasizes joint local/global token impact to keep 96.7% performance while achieving 78% compression.

模型压缩: SeedLM introduces a post-training compression method that uses seeds of a pseudo-random generator and linear combinations to reconstruct weight blocks, trading compute for fewer memory accesses during inference.

Experiments on Llama3 70B show zero-shot accuracy retention at 4- and 3-bit compression comparable to or better than state-of-the-art baselines, and FPGA tests report up to 4× speed-ups versus FP16 Llama 2/3 as model size grows.

notes: Compression is the central contribution, and the reported accuracy plus FPGA speed-ups confirm practical gains.

general: OmniKV cuts KV cache usage by up to 75% and extends Llama-3-8B’s context from 128K to 450K on A100 while keeping performance and boosting inference (1.68×) without token dropping.

notes: Layer-wise token importance similarity drives dynamic context selection, yielding training-free speed/memory gains for long-context LLM inference.

general: FlatQuant introduces Flatness-aware post-training quantization that learns per-linear-layer affine transformations, fusing them into a single kernel to accelerate execution while preserving accuracy.
模型压缩: Flattening weights and activations via the learnable affine transforms yields <1% accuracy drop on LLaMA-3-70B W4A4 and up to 2.3x prefill plus 1.7x decoding speedups, establishing a new quantization benchmark.

notes: Affine transformations are calibrated per layer and accelerated with Kronecker-parameterized operators to keep runtime overhead low.

general: CateKV 探索了关注长上下文任务时 LLM 里 attention 头部的顺序一致性，并基于这一发现改造 KV cache 结构。
上下文与缓存优化: 通过仅保留一致性头部的关键 token 信息并对自适应头部保留大多数 KV 对，CateKV 混合 KV cache 以显著缩减缓存大小并加速推理。

notes: CateKV 结合 coefficient-of-variation 算法定位一致性头部，既压缩 KV cache 也保留高准确度。

模型压缩: We introduce Delta-guided Two stage Pruning (DTP), a method that progressively reduces token redundancy through selective pruning at early layer and complete pruning at late layer.

notes: 摘要明确将 DTP 描述为通过层间 token 剪枝减少冗余以提升 Mamba 多模态 LLM 推理效率。

general: Abstract emphasizes SuffixDecoding, which caches long sequences from prompts/previous outputs to adaptively speculate tokens, accelerating inference for agentic workloads.
解码策略优化: SuffixDecoding leverages efficient suffix trees to adaptively speculate more tokens when acceptance likelihood is high, explicitly targeting speculative decoding to reduce latency.

上下文与缓存优化: Autoregressive models generate ultra-long videos sequentially, which is slow, and existing caching schemes assume uniform denoising despite varying similarity patterns—Flow Caching is introduced to address these autoregressive-specific context/cache challenges.

notes: 聚焦通过 Flow Caching 让 autoregressive 视频生成中的缓存策略与不同 chunk 的相似度模式匹配，从而加速推理。

general: Mixture of Experts (MoE) models have achieved great success by significantly improving performance while maintaining computational efficiency through sparse expert activation, but their enormous parameter sizes and memory demands pose significant challenges for deployment in resource-constrained environments.
模型压缩: KLT-guided SVD with Bias-Corrected Vector Quantization for MoE Large Language Models

notes: 摘要核心贡献是针对 MoE LLM 的量化/压缩方法。

general: SVDQuant proposes a new 4-bit quantization paradigm that absorbs outliers via a low-rank branch and offloads residuals to a low-bit branch, easing aggressive quantization of diffusion models while preserving quality.
模型压缩: The work aims to accelerate diffusion models by quantizing both weights and activations to 4 bits, shifting activation outliers into weights, and using a high-precision SVD low-rank branch alongside a low-bit branch to stabilize the aggressive quantization.
算子与内核优化: To avoid the overhead of the low-rank branch, the Nunchaku inference engine fuses its kernels with those of the low-bit branch, cutting redundant memory access and enabling the fused implementation to retain the quantization speedup.

notes: Reports 3.5× memory reduction on 12B FLUX.1, 3.0× speedup over W4A16 on RTX 4090, and 3.1× over W4A16 with NVFP4 on RTX 5090; code available in mit-han-lab repositories.

general: SpaceServe lets modality encoders and the shared decoder share a single GPU via fine-grained SM partitioning instead of idling resources through time-multiplexing, targeting MLLM serving latency head-on. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))
系统与调度优化: The cost-model-guided Space-Inference Scheduler dynamically assigns SM slices while the Time-Windowed Shortest-Remaining-First policy batches encoder requests to minimize completion latency and smooth decoder arrivals, which is the system-level scheduling innovation. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))

notes: Reported results show a 4.81× average and up to 28.9× reduction in time-per-output-token on Nvidia A100 GPUs thanks to the parallel scheduling strategy. ([abdn.elsevierpure.com](https://abdn.elsevierpure.com/en/publications/spaceserve-spatial-multiplexing-of-complementary-encoders-and-dec/?utm_source=openai))

general: Bit-DGDM 是针对离散图扩散模型的后训练量化框架，通过建模激活异常点及低秩分解加速推理，使 FP32 基线在内存使用上最多降低 2.8 倍并实现最高 2.5 倍加速。
模型压缩: 引入稀疏-密集激活量化（自适应选择全精度阈值，对其余部分量化到低位）和低秩分解+α-稀疏矩阵以建模异常点，从而实现低比特推理且保持性能。

notes: 以量化为核心贡献，主攻 DGDM 推理压缩与加速。

general: Abstract highlights frequency-domain KV cache compression to extend context window with minimal training, showing robust performance on prefilling and decoding stages.
上下文与缓存优化: Proposal iteratively compresses the growing KV cache in the frequency domain to let models process lengthy contexts efficiently, extending LLaMA-2-7B to 256K tokens while keeping perplexity stable, and consistently outperforming existing KV cache compression methods.

notes: FreqKV focuses on KV cache compression techniques to extend prefilling and decoding context lengths, not a new decoding strategy or system layer.

general: Presents an automated benchmarking framework to evaluate compressed LLMs on mobile devices (resource efficiency, energy, throughput, and harmful output) rather than proposing new optimization techniques.

notes: Evaluation study focused on comparing quantized models across mobile hardware constraints, not introducing novel optimizations.

general: FreeKV is a training-free algorithm-system co-optimization framework that introduces speculative retrieval plus hybrid CPU/GPU KV layouts and double-buffered streamed recall to hide selection/recall latency, yielding near-lossless accuracy and up to 13× speedup over prior KV retrieval methods. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))
上下文与缓存优化: Speculative retrieval shifts KV selection and recall out of the critical path via step-wise reuse with fine-grained correction, while hybrid KV layouts and double-buffered streamed recall eliminate fragmented transfers to optimize long-context KV cache handling. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))

notes: The paper centers on improving KV cache retrieval efficiency for long-context LLM inference by overlapping recall with computation and hiding CPU/GPU transfer latency while maintaining accuracy. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))

general: KV cache quantization can improve Large Language Models (LLMs) inference throughput and latency in long contexts and large batch-size scenarios while preserving LLMs effectiveness.
Elastic-Cache adaptively recomputes KV caches for diffusion LLMs to maximize prediction accuracy while minimizing decoding latency by jointly deciding when and where to refresh cache states.
上下文与缓存优化: The method deploys an attention-aware drift test on the most-attended token and a depth-aware schedule that reuses shallow-layer caches and off-window MASK caches, enabling adaptive, layer-aware cache updates that reduce redundant computation.

notes: 摘要强调通过 Elastic-Cache 的 attention- and depth-aware scheduling of KV refreshes to accelerate diffusion LLM decoding without extra training.

general: SALS projects the KV cache into a compact latent space via low-rank projection and performs sparse token selection using RoPE-free query-key interactions, reconstructing only a small subset of tokens to avoid the overhead of full KV cache reconstruction.

Experimental results show SALS achieves 6.4-fold KV cache compression and 5.7-fold speed-up in the attention operator compared to FlashAttention2 on 4K sequences, with end-to-end throughput gains of 1.4x/4.5x versus GPT-fast on 4K/32K.
上下文与缓存优化: By compressing the KV cache in latent space and selecting important tokens, SALS directly reduces KV cache size and the bandwidth needed for attention, delivering large cache compression and speed improvements.

notes: 核心贡献集中在面向长上下文推理的 KV cache 压缩与稀疏恢复，明确对应上下文与缓存优化。

general: PROXSPARSE 通过学习型半结构化稀疏掩码选择，基于正则化优化将非可导过程平滑化，允许渐进探索并在确定掩码后不再更新权重，其评测在7个主流模型均明显优于此前半结构化剪枝方法。
模型压缩: 论文核心在于 ProxSparse 的半结构化剪枝框架，使用学习驱动的掩码选择而非层级启发式策略，直接提升了 LLM 模型加速效果。

notes: 摘要清楚表明贡献来自一种新的半结构化剪枝/掩码学习机制，主攻模型压缩优化。

general: Phase-aware precision allocation and progressive mixed-precision decoding introduce spectrum of precision-switching schedulers that dynamically lower precision deeper in the generated sequence to balance context extraction and decoding memory bandwidth. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5df4313ecd4875931fbdacc486cc1fcf-Abstract-Conference.html))
模型压缩: Quantization to 2/3-bit precision is used to reduce weight storage in decoding, while PMPD and its task/prompt-adaptive schedulers deliver 1.4–12.2× matrix-vector speedups on GPUs and 3.8–8.0× throughput gains on a LLM-optimized NPU over fp16 baselines, preserving output quality compared to uniform quantization. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5df4313ecd4875931fbdacc486cc1fcf-Abstract-Conference.html))

notes: Focuses on efficient low-precision LLM inference for resource-constrained devices by deploying PMPD on Nvidia GPUs and an LLM-optimized NPU, showing strong throughput improvements. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/5df4313ecd4875931fbdacc486cc1fcf-Abstract-Conference.html))

general: DFloat11 是一个无损压缩框架，通过熵编码和动态长度表示将 LLM/DM 权重压缩约 30% 并保持位级相同输出。
在保持固定 GPU 内存预算下，DFloat11 实现了远超未压缩模型的生成长度并带来 2.3～46.2× 的吞吐提升。
模型压缩: DFloat11 针对 BFloat16 权重引入频率感知动态长度编码，达成近信息最优的无损压缩。
作者为动态长度编码配套设计了定制 GPU kernel（包括层级 LUT、两阶段线程同步及 transformer 块级解压），以支持压缩模型的高效推理。

notes: DFloat11 的核心贡献是针对 LLM/DM 的无损压缩与 inference-friendly 解压实现，明确对模型压缩方法进行优化。

模型压缩: Abstract claims that the paper provides the first mathematical proof that sparsity and quantization are non-orthogonal and that the order of applying these compression methods as well as their compounded errors critically affect accuracy.

The authors demonstrate across OPT, LLaMA, ViT, and ResNet families how applying quantization before sparsity can remove significant tensor elements and how their combined use without care harms accuracy, offering best-practice insights for deploying compression on resource-constrained platforms.

notes: Paper’s core contribution is analyzing and guiding the combined use of sparsity and quantization for model compression, not introducing new decoding/system/kernel techniques.

general: ChanMix is a channel-aware mixed-precision quantization framework for the KV cache that reallocates bits across retrieval-sensitive, outlier, and robust channels, pairing its low-bit support with custom Triton kernels to keep long-context performance intact while shrinking memory use. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=yjr2jX41qO))
上下文与缓存优化: The sensitivity-aware bit allocation deliberately targets KV cache channels so that crucial long-context retrieval channels retain higher precision while weaker channels shrink to 2-bit, directly optimizing KV cache memory for long-context inference. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=yjr2jX41qO))

Benchmarks on NIAH, RULER, and InfiniteBench report ≥5-point accuracy gains versus uniform quantization plus a 2.3× larger batch size and 1.5× longer context capacity, showing concrete improvements to KV cache scalability. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=yjr2jX41qO))

notes: Focusing on KV cache quantization for long-context LLM inference makes the work a context-and-cache optimization (not a broader system/kernel change), so the positive preference label is 上下文与缓存优化. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=yjr2jX41qO))
